body:
We refuse to stand by and watch while Texas voters and voters across the country face attacks on their right to vote. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38621736/316286825/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA5NWVlYS02OTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r8j8Q7Af_BdIyWb3A9Uq5JVJRvTUVhe54u69k2eFfSA=&emci=84efebcd-d343-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=83095eea-6945-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=561582) | Team: The ability to vote and access to voting are among the most critical pieces of our democracy. But this year especially, extremist legislators have come after this most-democratic tool in efforts to manipulate the voting process to their benefit. _Right now, the Department of Justice has filed suit against Texas’ new voter restrictions that "will disenfranchise eligible Texas citizens who seek to exercise their right to vote."_ **We refuse to stand by and watch while Texas voters and voters across the country face attacks on their right to vote.** [**Will you sign our petition and demand that voting rights be protected in Texas and states everywhere?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38621737/316286826/1846662665?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA5NWVlYS02OTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r8j8Q7Af_BdIyWb3A9Uq5JVJRvTUVhe54u69k2eFfSA=&emci=84efebcd-d343-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=83095eea-6945-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=561582) [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38621738/316286827/1846662665?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA5NWVlYS02OTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r8j8Q7Af_BdIyWb3A9Uq5JVJRvTUVhe54u69k2eFfSA=&emci=84efebcd-d343-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=83095eea-6945-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=561582) Make no mistake, these sweeping voter restriction laws in states across the country are no accident. They are a calculated attack by extremist legislators — disproportionately targeted at people of color, voters with disabilities, those with limited English proficiency, and other voters who face obstacles at the ballot box. The attack on voting rights is un-American and anti-democratic, making it harder for everyday citizens to vote for ballot measures and make real change happen at the ballot box. **Every single American reserves the right to cast their vote and make their voice heard.** [**If you agree, will you add your name to our petition and demand that voting rights be protected in states across the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38621739/316286828/1846662665?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA5NWVlYS02OTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r8j8Q7Af_BdIyWb3A9Uq5JVJRvTUVhe54u69k2eFfSA=&emci=84efebcd-d343-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=83095eea-6945-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=561582) [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38621740/316286829/1846662665?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA5NWVlYS02OTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r8j8Q7Af_BdIyWb3A9Uq5JVJRvTUVhe54u69k2eFfSA=&emci=84efebcd-d343-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=83095eea-6945-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=561582) Thanks for your help in the fight to protect our democracy. — The Fairness Project

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Time is running out to help Kyle Rittenhouse
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies.
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj0pb3jjqpv9datpo5qt04snq85hhfc9rvppr0o0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjg6eob2c5h2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo8hir931b1u1dhrp9j8n0fab5mgahr168v7kkno_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjg6eob2c5h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm6154rj2m2ieh976v3nbm4ti8fr0ucbsjf773qg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjg6eob2c5h2bs)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl6mpo1shmqv9tiq5o7t840q7vs1fo6ki0ar4l8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjg6eob2c5h2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friend,
I’m reaching out to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign before our mid-quarter fundraising deadline tomorrow.
Will you give me a moment to explain why your $3 is so important?
Pat Toomey's retirement means we're running for an open seat — and since it's the seat most likely to flip from red to blue next year, it's the most important Senate race in the country.
It's going to be a fierce competition. That's why our opponents are taking money from corporate PACs to try and get an advantage.
**But I refuse to do that. I'm running to represent working folks, not CEOs and big money.**
So my campaign is powered by grassroots donations — real people who believe in our movement, chipping in a few bucks at a time. That's why I'm asking you to make a $3 contribution today.
[If you're able, will you pitch in that $3 as part of our 72-hour fundraising drive? Your donation makes a powerful statement that people-power is greater than big money.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38622052/316289172/-360183459?refcode2=28f388a2-6c45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211114-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGYzODhhMi02YzQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wR8UWDm_PVh3T3KJqSYPENeGqVLlPufnN989_ytlvu4=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38622053/316289173/-360183459?refcode2=28f388a2-6c45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211114-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGYzODhhMi02YzQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wR8UWDm_PVh3T3KJqSYPENeGqVLlPufnN989_ytlvu4=)**
Thanks in advance for your donation.
All my best,
Malcolm

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: December is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
And there’s still so much work to be done
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38622500/316291196/-1540418300?amount=20&refcode=jtk1072-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQxOTJmZC02YzQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LoYjptynOKNc-GpEYhzqIb5GNfMsi4Hoc3RBYPl1-gQ=)
---
I'm about to ask you for $20, Peter – but first, I want to explain why:
**When our legislative session begins in January, we won't be able to fundraise for several months, but the fundraising blackout may begin as early as December.[So I'm asking every supporter to pitch in $20 today to help us raise as much as we can before the end of the year. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38622501/316291197/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=20&refcode=jtk1072-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQxOTJmZC02YzQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LoYjptynOKNc-GpEYhzqIb5GNfMsi4Hoc3RBYPl1-gQ=)**
Our grassroots movement has already done so much for the people of New Mexico: We’ve had the most successful vaccination campaign in the country, invested in our schools and educators, raised the minimum wage for the first time in a decade, and provided crucial relief for small businesses during the pandemic.
But there’s still so much work to be done –** and that means we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to pass our bold agenda.** If New Mexico flips red, all of our progress could be undone.
I know December sounds far off, but for our finance team, it's right around the corner. They tell me that if we don't hit our fundraising goals this month, we'll have to face some tough decisions about our outreach efforts as this election heats up.
**So, I'm turning to my strongest supporters today for your help. **Your $20 is all we need to hit our goal and continue working on our bold, progressive agenda for New Mexico. **Please, Peter, I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important:**
**[We only have until early December to reach our goal. Will you donate $20 right now to keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38622502/316291198/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=20&refcode=jtk1072-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQxOTJmZC02YzQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LoYjptynOKNc-GpEYhzqIb5GNfMsi4Hoc3RBYPl1-gQ=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38622503/316291199/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=20&refcode=jtk1072-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQxOTJmZC02YzQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LoYjptynOKNc-GpEYhzqIb5GNfMsi4Hoc3RBYPl1-gQ=)
---
None of the work we've accomplished would have been possible without your help. I can't thank you enough for your grassroots support.

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b46d6b62-c741-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/e4d192fd-6c45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQxOTJmZC02YzQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LoYjptynOKNc-GpEYhzqIb5GNfMsi4Hoc3RBYPl1-gQ=&id=127162320) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer

name: Eddie Gallagher, Navy SEAL Chief (Ret.)
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse is in the crosshairs. We must act.
body:
I know all too well what it's like to be the target of a vicious, political prosecution. After nearly 20 years of decorated se
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf19teacup3urcsekrpt8mvct0h4mpta20ppnc3o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2t5hmsqm4p5mcji36ctl6eonddll6gp71ob6e4qj0slje3hr3d3j65gb2d1kmsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0ear6ccln6diefclkcoob1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cphm9o34s9gm8oh5u)
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6atu78grp18p556d9vahu4onjb0ir36515herbg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjg69oj1chh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**I know all too well what it's like to be the target of a vicious, political prosecution. **

After nearly 20 years of decorated service as a Navy SEAL, I was arrested and charged with the murder of an ISIS terrorist in Iraq. I was facing not only life in prison, but an endless campaign of slander and misinformation from our corrupt media.

Thankfully my family fought back publicly and fearlessly, caught the attention of President Trump, and I was freed from the brig and allowed to properly prepare for trial. I was found not guilty and allowed to keep my trident – but our life was a living hell for a long time.

**Now, Kyle Rittenhouse is in the crosshairs and I refuse to sit back.** As I've watched his trial, it's become crystal clear that Kyle acted in self-defense.

**[I'm emailing you now because through FreeKyleUSA, Kyle's mother Wendy has been furiously working to raise money for his legal defense, and they urgently need our help. Will you make a donation right now?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsmh5o7gdr3lrgtb87u934e3sqpslv9gblnq7jto_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjg69oj1chh2bs)**

|
---
More and more nowadays, if you're considered a political enemy of the powers-that-be, the rule book gets thrown out and anything goes.

The media, politicians, tech companies and other powerful interests band together to try and crush you financially and personally. The "narrative" takes precedence over the truth, and people's lives can be forever ruined.

**That is not the America that I dedicated my life to defend.**

It shouldn't have to be this way, but I know from my own experience that if enough people stand up and push back, justice can still prevail. And right now, justice means a "not guilty" verdict and Kyle Rittenhouse getting his life back.

**It can happen, but his legal defense is incredibly costly and he needs the support of millions of patriotic Americans across this country.**

**[I'm calling on you to help because believe it or not, your donation will make a difference. So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now, and let's pray that Kyle gets the justice he deserves.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zagc8uq5hjrukjt6i8asir9djvsadnm5arq3649o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjg69oj1chh2bs)**

The truth, and our God-given right of self-defense still mean something in this country, and we have the power, today, to stand up for both.

Thank you for your time.

Steadfast,
Eddie Gallagher
Navy SEAL Special Operations Chief (Ret.)

name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader that understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38622588/316291509/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1637-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmQxOTJmZC02YzQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJMQd5mxLcEDfuO59ftGqyWYxO_iGlBAXbnyj2E4U0E=)**
All the best,

Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38622589/316291510/-144803992?refcode=jtk1637-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmQxOTJmZC02YzQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJMQd5mxLcEDfuO59ftGqyWYxO_iGlBAXbnyj2E4U0E=&emci=ed16bedd-4b42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ebd192fd-6c45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ed16bedd-4b42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/ebd192fd-6c45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmQxOTJmZC02YzQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJMQd5mxLcEDfuO59ftGqyWYxO_iGlBAXbnyj2E4U0E=&id=123159867). Hey there, As Michael’s wife, I get to see his dedication to our state firsthand. It’s clear that Colorado’s future guides his every trip through our state, every meeting, and every negotiation. Michael is focused on delivering for Colorado, which doesn’t leave much time for fundraising. Michael’s team says they’re $9,981 short of where they need to be at this point of the month this month, so he’s counting on you. Grassroots donations are particularly critical to Michael’s re-election campaign because he prioritizes your voice, and doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. By putting Colordans first, Michael helped expand the Child Tax Credit, which has helped one million Colorado kids and kept more than three million kids out of poverty nationwide. Now he’s fighting to extend it. By listening to Coloradans, he fought to roll back Trump policies that hurt our state’s environment and left Tribal communities out of critical conversations regarding the public lands they find sacred. All this and more makes Michael a top target for the National GOP, so falling short this month is not an option. I’m proud of what Michael has achieved so far this year. I can’t wait to see what he gets done next and, upon re-election, how he’ll build on his years of service to our state. But we can’t get there without your support before tomorrow’s deadline. **Contribute to the $9,981 Michael needs before tomorrow’s mid-month deadline and pitch in $10 — or whatever works for your budget — today.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38623001/316293772/-1836949484?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211114_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDE1ODA3ZS03MDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=leKv4GkIqdk0qR2aY1TWt_fYGcRpHdZZt3eEgLDhAlQ=)****

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Do you support this mission, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760306:6R4w9x2KN:m:1:3253819041:3E1E9301A975E7185F208AADDF435626:r)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I 'm 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That's why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I'm traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

_**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**_

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I'm staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760306:6R4w9x2KN:m:1:3253819041:3E1E9301A975E7185F208AADDF435626:r "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760306:6R4w9x2KN:m:1:3253819041:3E1E9301A975E7185F208AADDF435626:r)
---

My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, _I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again._ That's made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

_**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **_

That's why I am hoping you will _**[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760306:6R4w9x2KN:m:1:3253819041:3E1E9301A975E7185F208AADDF435626:r "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First
conservatives.")**_ The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760306:6R4w9x2KN:m:1:3253819041:3E1E9301A975E7185F208AADDF435626:r)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760306:6R4w9x2KN:m:1:3253819041:3E1E9301A975E7185F208AADDF435626:r)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION to **29910****
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760306:6R4w9x2KN:m:1:3253819041:3E1E9301A975E7185F208AADDF435626:r "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to _**WIN BIG**_ for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. _**[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760306:6R4w9x2KN:m:1:3253819041:3E1E9301A975E7185F208AADDF435626:r "Will you chip in to
help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**_

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I may lose re-election because of the swamp...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763626:JnTx9x2wN:m:1:3298722022:546E80B353F53A7C3E5F93BE5C6702C8:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763626:JnTx9x2wN:m:1:3298722022:546E80B353F53A7C3E5F93BE5C6702C8:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763626:JnTx9x2wN:m:1:3298722022:546E80B353F53A7C3E5F93BE5C6702C8:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763626:JnTx9x2wN:m:1:3298722022:546E80B353F53A7C3E5F93BE5C6702C8:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763626:JnTx9x2wN:m:1:3298722022:546E80B353F53A7C3E5F93BE5C6702C8:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763626:JnTx9x2wN:m:1:3298722022:546E80B353F53A7C3E5F93BE5C6702C8:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763626:JnTx9x2wN:m:1:3298722022:546E80B353F53A7C3E5F93BE5C6702C8:r)
Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763626:JnTx9x2wN:m:1:3298722022:546E80B353F53A7C3E5F93BE5C6702C8:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763626:JnTx9x2wN:m:1:3298722022:546E80B353F53A7C3E5F93BE5C6702C8:r)
Jim

clean_body: RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! | Peter, They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again. RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points. The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties. whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years. My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job. I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic. Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down. No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built. Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by: Forcing critical race theory into our schools. Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts. Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY. That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that ** You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country. I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people! name: Marisa Wood
subject: Farmers in the Central Valley.
body:
It's shameful that McCarthy hears from farmers about their plight, ignores them, and then plays political games to advance his career. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38623348/316295819/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWNiNzVhZi03NDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JbDNxrrPPTSECj6YB9SfRW4iUMcCP7-REDNCpLFc97A=)
Friend,

**[This is a long, but important email about how Democrats' infrastructure deal will be a huge boon for the Central Valley. Please read it, then if you can, chip in $3 to defeat my opponent Kevin McCarthy who tried to block it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38623353/316295829/-787496292?refcode=em-111421-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWNiNzVhZi03NDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JbDNxrrPPTSECj6YB9SfRW4iUMcCP7-REDNCpLFc97A=)**

The _Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework (BIF)_ invests $1.2 trillion into the country's roads, bridges, mass transit, and more. Rural communities in California stand to benefit at ton -- with new roads, waterways and wildfire prevention measures.

Of course, my opponent Kevin McCarthy voted against this deal. Not only that, he’s punishing the few Republicans who voted for it. McCarthy is clearly more interested in backing Trump and the “Conspiracy Caucus” who he needs to win the Speakership.

While he's playing party politics -- farmers and their advocates in our community are calling this a critical investment in rural infrastructure.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38623355/316295831/-787496292?refcode=em-111421-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWNiNzVhZi03NDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JbDNxrrPPTSECj6YB9SfRW4iUMcCP7-REDNCpLFc97A=)
My family used to live on an apple orchard, and my husband's still in the agricultural business -- so we hear from farmers all the time about their challenges. Farming is hard work, and more and more families leave farming because the day-to-day rigors are made worse by the lack of support from people like McCarthy.

It's hard to hear these stories and not feel compelled to do something. It's one of the reasons I wanted to run for office. It's shameful that McCarthy hears from farmers, ignores them, and then plays political games to advance his career.

**It's time for McCarthy to go, but defeating him will take a whole lot of grassroots support from across California and the rest of the country.**

**[I need a boost from you today -- 16 donations from your area before midnight -- to send a strong message to McCarthy that his time is up. name: Elaine Luria
subject: Some good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
---
| | | **The 2022 Midterm Elections will be here before we know it and I have a mid-month fundraising deadline this week-- will you rush a donation today to kickstart my campaign?** | | | [Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38623338/316295812/1017468089?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211114_FR_MM2GoodandBad_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzgwN2RhOS03NDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cRSkQWFi1fQYTPC00-lgjNvnhhxAmyMODpBOuQSUPvc=)
---
Folks,
In the wake of Republican Glenn Youngkin’s victory, my team and I asked if you’re still feeling confident about Democrats’ chances of winning in the 2022 midterms -- and the results were... mixed.
Some folks are still feeling confident, while others are doubtful that Democrats can pull off wins up and down the ballot.
But, there was one piece of heartening news from this survey -- despite doubts about the 2022 midterm elections as a whole, **a majority of you are still _very_ confident in my chances of holding my seat!**
I’m also confident, team. As long as I have all of you in my corner, I know there’s nothing that we can’t achieve.
**So if you’re going to take away anything from Virginia’s election results, let it be this: We need to start ramping up our campaign for 2022 right now.**
Early investments are crucial for preparing for anything our opponents throw at us. As a top target of the National Republican Congressional Committee, I’m already getting attacked and national Republicans are prepared to spend millions to unseat me. Plus, I have a mid-month fundraising deadline at the end of the week.
[**That’s why I have to ask: Will you help me stay vigilant by chipping in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38623339/316295813/1017468089?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211114_FR_MM2GoodandBad_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzgwN2RhOS03NDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cRSkQWFi1fQYTPC00-lgjNvnhhxAmyMODpBOuQSUPvc=)

clean_body: | | | The 2022 Midterm Elections will be here before we know it and I have a mid-month fundraising deadline this week-- will you rush a donation today to kickstart my campaign? | | | = Folks, In the wake of Republican Glenn Youngkin’s victory, my team and I asked if you’re still feeling confident about Democrats’ chances of winning in the 2022 midterms -- and the results were... mixed. Some folks are still feeling confident, while others are doubtful that Democrats can pull off wins up and down the ballot. But, there was one piece of heartening news from this survey -- despite doubts about the 2022 midterm elections as a whole, a majority of you are still very confident in my chances of holding my seat! I’m also confident, team. As long as I have all of you in my corner, I know there’s nothing that we can’t achieve. So if you’re going to take away anything from Virginia’s election results, let it be this: We need to start ramping up our campaign for 2022 right now. Early investments are crucial for preparing for anything our opponents throw at us. As a top target of the National Republican Congressional Committee, I’m already getting attacked and national Republicans are prepared to spend millions to unseat me. Plus, I have a mid-month fundraising deadline at the end of the week. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Elaine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . | | Peter, I don’t need to remind you that organizing everywhere is going to help us win our campaign. It worked before and it will work again. But I wanted to share a story with you about why door knocking truly matters. [**Before I begin, will you chip in $3 today to help our team meet our mid-month goal so we can keep up our organizing momentum?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38623494/316296063/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211114_FR_DoorStory_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2NiNzVhZi03NDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X_6JNooradV5PtRLUj-RgUJtfehwEJQjnUpUaWaE9JU=) | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38623495/316296064/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211114_FR_DoorStory_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2NiNzVhZi03NDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X_6JNooradV5PtRLUj-RgUJtfehwEJQjnUpUaWaE9JU=)

I’ve been thinking a lot about what one voter shared with me when I campaigned in Macon and Clay counties a few weeks ago.
She told me that we were the first campaign to _ever_ come to her door -- she’s lived in that same house her entire life, too.
That stopped me in my tracks. You see, pundits love to write North Carolina off as the newest red state. But it’s not. What it really is, is a gerrymandered state.
The tides are turning, Peter, presenting an incredible opportunity for our campaign to make history this election. We have a real chance at winning -- and people know it. That’s why Madison Cawthorn exited this race to run in a safe Republican district.
We believe in a politics that helps us move forward together. But in order to mobilize people to show up at the ballot box, we have to organize first. And by knocking on doors, we are having face-to-face conversations that are about listening and showing up. That’s how you start to build connections and relationships.
[**Being out on the campaign trail means connecting with people all over WNC and we’re loving every second of it. But we can’t keep moving forward without your help. Will you chip in $3 or more to help us keep going?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38623499/316296065/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211114_FR_DoorStory_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2NiNzVhZi03NDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X_6JNooradV5PtRLUj-RgUJtfehwEJQjnUpUaWaE9JU=)

name: Holly McCormack
subject: These resources will save lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter,
I’m writing today to share my deepest appreciation for all of our nation’s veterans. Growing up on army bases and in a family full of veterans, I learned discipline very early on and that service is meant to be selfless.
Today, we want to honor members of the Armed Forces that have defended our nation’s freedom and protected our country's future.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88943/images/Image%20from%20iOS%20%2851%29.jpg]Today also reminds us that we must do more to protect our veterans when they re-enter civilian life. After returning home many veterans are not given adequate support. GA-14 has a considerable veteran population yet we only have one VA hospital in the district and no veterans’ cemeteries . We must do better. We will do better. That's why I'm running to change the way that we treat our veterans when they return home.
We owe a debt to those who’ve placed their lives on the line to protect our freedom as Americans, and we have to do better to provide for their care and to honor their sacrifices.
Sincerely,
Holly McCormack.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1111] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] http://www.hollyforcongress.org/ [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
Paid for by Holly for Congress
Holly McCormack for Congress
862 Lafayette St
PO Box 1035
Ringgold, GA 30736
United States

Team,

In my run for New York's 1st Congressional District, it's crucial that I know what's most important to you.

Let me explain: I'm running for Congress to be an advocate for all Long Islanders -- for parents, educators, small business owners, first responders, essential workers, and most importantly, our kids.

To do this job and to do it well, I need to hear from folks like you. For too long, we haven’t had representation that reflects our priorities. **If we're going to build back better and invest in a future we can all flourish in, I need to know what's important for you and your family.**

[MORE OPTIONS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38624660/316301230/186561527?ms=em21_welcome2&refcode=em21_welcome2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjcyNjg5ZS03YjQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdLIrGkBlZr9MhGRu3kBqgycaRnYOuhu5kalhOxo4yg=&emci=cb4b32ee-94d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=db72689e-7b45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369896) **I know after serving nearly a decade in the County Legislature, that in order to actually make a difference in the lives of New Yorkers, we need to know what folks are facing day-to-day.**

If you're having trouble paying for lifesaving medication or services, I want to know how I can help. If you're having trouble affording housing payments, I want to know how government can make a difference for you. And if you're worried about your children's future, you should know that I'm right there with you, and I'm eager to hear your thoughts.

**[That starts today, just as soon as you take our brief 2021 issues survey. Can you let me know what's most important to you, team?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38624661/316301231/186561527?ms=em21_welcome2&refcode=em21_welcome2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjcyNjg5ZS03YjQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdLIrGkBlZr9MhGRu3kBqgycaRnYOuhu5kalhOxo4yg=&emci=cb4b32ee-94d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=db72689e-7b45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369896)** [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38624662/316301232/186561527?ms=em21_welcome2&refcode=em21_welcome2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjcyNjg5ZS03YjQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdLIrGkBlZr9MhGRu3kBqgycaRnYOuhu5kalhOxo4yg=&emci=cb4b32ee-94d2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=db72689e-7b45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369896) Thanks for taking the time to hear from me,

Kara Hahn [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38624663/316301233/-1251159875?refcode=em21_welcome2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjcyNjg5ZS03YjQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdLIrGkBlZr9MhGRu3kBqgycaRnYOuhu5kalhOxo4yg=)

subject: More Fines for Being Free

body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760352:Jlnsxx21N:m:1:3253819041:6C5B6DAD8820F7B4A599B4C37DA36CC4:r "Headline") Peter: I will never allow Nancy Pelosi to tell me what to do. I don't care how many times she threatens me, and I don't care how many times she fines me. I will not wear a face diaper - they do nothing to protect anyone. This, of course, forces Nancy to retire to her fainting couch in horror. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760352:Jlnsxx21N:m:1:3253819041:6C5B6DAD8820F7B4A599B4C37DA36CC4:r "Nancy")**_Good. Angering Nancy Pelosi is the surest sign I know how to show I am on the right track.[If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to take actions that make her FURIOUS.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760352:Jlnsxx21N:m:1:3253819041:6C5B6DAD8820F7B4A599B4C37DA36CC4:r "If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to
take actions that make her FURIOUS.")_** I was born in America, and I am free - my freedom is my birthright. That birthright is behind every vote I take in Congress, and I will never stop fighting for freedom. Sadly, for our nation, my commitment to our freedom makes me a target for so many powerful entities. **[I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760352:Jlnsxx21N:m:1:3253819041:6C5B6DAD8820F7B4A599B4C37DA36CC4:r "I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict
your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.")** They HATE our freedom and our unwillingness to accept their socialist takeover. They HATED President Trump for fighting to protect it. They HATE me for continuing that work. And that HATE colors every decision they make, just as my love for America colors every decision I make to uphold our Constitution. I will not wear a mask simply because Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Fauci decreed it, and I won't stop fighting for this nation. We will make decisions about our "public safety," and we'll never allow the radical left to force their demands on us. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760352:Jlnsxx21N:m:1:3253819041:6C5B6DAD8820F7B4A599B4C37DA36CC4:r "Not when I have patriots like you on my team.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760352:Jlnsxx21N:m:1:3253819041:6C5B6DAD8820F7B4A599B4C37DA36CC4:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Derrick Van Orden
subject: Will you help send a SEAL to Washington, D.C?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763769:JkxYxx2NG:m:1:3298722022:DE017328074F147BC26B4B6464E89BE6:r)
---
_SEND A TRUMP-ENDORSED NAVY SEAL TO CONGRESS_
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763769:JkxYxx2NG:m:1:3298722022:DE017328074F147BC26B4B6464E89BE6:r "EXPRESS DONATE $5")
---
Hey there, it's Derrick Van Orden.

I'm a retired Navy SEAL, Afghanistan War Veteran & Trump-endorsed conservative running to beat Pelosi. I'm a Navy SEAL, so I'm not someone who usually reaches out like this, **[but I'm asking if you will help with just $5?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763769:JkxYxx2NG:m:1:3298722022:DE017328074F147BC26B4B6464E89BE6:r "but I'm asking if
you will help with just $5?")**

I wanted to take a minute to introduce myself and ask you to join my team of grassroots supporters. Because if I am going to fight back against the Radical Left's attacks, I need people like you, Fellow Conservative, in my corner.

I first answered the call to serve my country at 18 when I enlisted in the US Navy. And after 26 years of military service including multiple combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, I am ready to continue serving this great country in Congress.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763769:JkxYxx2NG:m:1:3298722022:DE017328074F147BC26B4B6464E89BE6:r)
---
_SEND A TRUMP-ENDORSED NAVY SEAL TO CONGRESS_
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763769:JkxYxx2NG:m:1:3298722022:DE017328074F147BC26B4B6464E89BE6:r "EXPRESS DONATE $5")
---
But my race will be one of the toughest for Republicans anywhere this time around. Because here's the thing: liberal mega donors already spent millions attacking me in 2020 and are ready to do the same again this year.

Listen, I'm no politician, just an everyday American who loves this country and has dedicated my life to serving it. And right now, America needs more patriots in congress who will put America first, not themselves.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38624835/316302746/635930916?refcode=AU_BBD_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20211114_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJlODUxMC03ZDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=en5Ba-7u1WI_72-sWgksQuDAhZuSAtotpUH1qS4XaC4=)
Hi folks, Christina here, Deputy Campaign Manager on Team Ben. A few days ago, we reached out to share why your support is so important in this moment. Our critical mid-quarter fundraising deadline is at midnight tomorrow, and we have a ways to go to ensure we are on track to end the year in a strong position. Each $3 (or more!) contribution makes a true impact on our daily campaign activities — including getting Ben and the team out in our communities and sharing our vision for the future of Massachusetts. subject: North Carolina deserves better.

body:
#

Friends -
As you may know, Republicans in the North Carolina legislature recently pushed through a new, extremely gerrymandered Congressional map that ensures 10 safe Republican seats.
There was even a safe seat specifically drawn for Tim Moore, the Speaker of the NC House, according to news reports.
That alone reeks of corruption, but now, Madison Cawthorn has decided he’s going to run in that district — one he doesn’t even live in.
The outcome? He’s now cleared the field.
And it’s clear this is what we’re going to face in this Senate race too. Trump has already endorsed our opponent Ted Budd, and a far-right super PAC has spent more than $3 million dollars on ads propping up his campaign already — with millions more pledged in spending.
So it’s up to all of us to do everything we can to stop them. We cannot let these extremists win this Senate seat.
[**If you believe the people deserve a voice in the Senate, please make a contribution to our campaign to elect Cheri Beasley today. name: Bobby Maggio
subject: Hey Derek - I’m Bobby.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m reaching out to you for the very first time because I have to share a big announcement.
#
Hi Derek,
My name is Bobby Maggio, and I’m the Campaign Manager here on Team Fetterman. I’m a native Yinzer from beautiful Butler County (hoping the Steelers beat the Lions today!).
I first met John when he came to speak at my alma mater, Slippery Rock University, back in 2015. Even then, I knew he was a true leader for PA. And ever since, I’ve believed that he can win this U.S. Senate seat and flip PA blue.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37367?refcode=em20211114-3440&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3440%2E434096%2EP_dEua)
**I’m reaching out to you for the very first time because I have to share a big announcement:**
Today marks the four-year anniversary to the day that John announced his candidacy for Lieutenant Governor. During that race, John and I traveled 80,000 miles together in his truck meeting voters in all 67 counties of Pennsylvania.
Everything we’ve been able to do since then — and everything we’ll do on this campaign for Senate in the future — is thanks to grassroots supporters like you.
**That’s why we’re launching a big mid-month fundraising push to stay on track before the rush of the holidays.**
Reaching this goal is so important that I’m coming to you directly for the first time. If we don’t catch up on our fundraising now, we’ll be behind when the rubber hits the road in 2022.
[**_So Derek, can you please make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can to help us hit our mid-month fundraising goal? Every donation counts in this make-or-break moment._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37367?refcode=em20211114-3440&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3440%2E434096%2EP_dEua)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37367?refcode=em20211114-3440&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3440%2E434096%2EP_dEua)**
It’s clear to the voters that John isn’t like other politicians. He’s a regular guy with a bold, populist record who appeals to folks across the political spectrum.
That’s why we’re running a 67 county campaign across our Commonwealth, building relationships on the ground everywhere and proving to folks that John will always show up.
[**_To keep that effort up, it’s crucial we make a big mid-month fundraising push before folks are busy with the holidays. Can you be the one to step up and help us reach our goal?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37367?refcode=em20211114-3440&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3440%2E434096%2EP_dEua)
The stakes for PA and for our democracy are high right now, but I know this team has what it takes to win because together, we’ve done it before.
Thanks,
Bobby Maggio
Campaign Manager
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211114-3440-footer&t=23&refcode2=3440_434096_P_dEua&akid=3440%2E434096%2EP_dEua)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=3440%2E434096%2EP_dEua)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3440%2E434096%2EP_dEua)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re trying to draw me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrqrvm36k6v8mvue45qav7p8l8isedsb9caqka8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s9melob0thksdpn0tb4caoj1d1hctgnbddhc3hr4d5imlj72dhgc6rm1o34mmo6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbcphimipm6pti69j32s5ic8r749fg)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgp5lmf2vpqkrbla0798lp23au85nhkq95objch0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfa6joutb4qsfd0d7jmt99cht1koh6d6e11vno9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziui4qc4m56flaumlqactfiirspfpfh2bjt4g0u0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb7vd9h4o8pfrb6g8jbgm7op27t424vj1v2te76g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpfsbv55g31l9dm0su35sdnrtov0fqho2cp2o150_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl2m0nkfegc58imr93imk6e03864t9jokuslqp68_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs5egp7lo00egma80bop5cqmf491j7ut5p46s4n8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlmjo8s5n309fees6rugd0c2kevonjkls91mnjlo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

Jim

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job. I’m not done fighting on your behalf. name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Time is running out to help Kyle Rittenhouse
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies.
_Sponsored message_
| | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zginl8d606pu223kbbu6qp120tkqf1e91nkq5ed0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now with trial underway, it has been falling apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zclbopbrn7n5tacockj15h0frbn9ncpqefqc3bn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmljieapp7mpnhjhjgul132vig4s6u9mkkq313fo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth2bs)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zred6g93aor2kjtu41mj08trrrq28pnk92dav8l8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z86al3ggid3c3juav6h7j6d6rttb7oaa6ng8h1c0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cji66ob2cth2bs)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The right-wing misinformation machine. This is how it works:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek — let me be absolutely clear about one thing: **The Fox News Misinformation Machine is a danger to our nation. To our democracy. And to the idea of truth itself.** You’re probably thinking “yes, I know all of this.” But I want to explain to you why it matters, and how the Fox News Misinformation Machine really works. **[Warning, this email is longer than usual. It’s critically important and I hope you’ll stick around until the end. But if you're short on time and already know you want to stand up to the likes of Fox News and its lies, consider clicking here and pitching in $10 right away>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38625597/316306016/-751938712?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211114_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzJmNmIxNS03ZTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b4adYGgfLdlNAoAB-laG9trPCfsYfFB0LzKYRq8wHKs=)** Since my appearance on The View on Tuesday, Fox News, One America News Network, and Newsmax have attacked me over 60 times, running segments smearing me, and inviting guests to attack my credibility. And that number has probably gone up since my team last checked. Why? Because I took the conservative guest host to task for her deliberately false and misleading questions about the Russia investigation that implicated Trump. OANN gave voice to a conspiratorial Republican Congressman – yes, Madison Cawthorn, who continues to stoke violence, and who, in a case of the pot calling the kettle black, claimed I was spreading “Russian disinformation.” Greg Gutfeld on Fox called me “repulsive.” Jeanine Pirro focused more on attacking me as her “least favorite congressman” (a definite badge of honor). And I won’t even get into what Geraldo Rivera and Jesse Watters said. **__Hours of coverage. Hours of attacks. All to protect Donald Trump. And to smear me.__** So how does this Fox News Misinformation Machine really operate, and why is it a danger to our democracy. First, Fox News will find one small moment that they can take out of context, label it as a Republican “obliterating” or “destroying” a Democrat. If the Democrat responds to the attack, they edit out the rebuttal and imply there was no response. Second, they invite on fringe guests, fringe Congressmen, and right-wing analysts to build a ten-second clip into a day or two of coverage. The target will be called names, be told they should resign or face prison, or worse. It also results in Twitter hate and death threats. Third, the right-wing ecosystem springs to action. “News” stories proliferate on Daily Caller, Fox News, Breitbart, and the like. Selectively edited clips are tweeted and shared. There were almost 100,000 tweets about me on Tuesday and Wednesday, almost all from right-wing figures. Fourth, they seek to dishonestly reframe the debate on their terms, favorable to Trump and Republicans in the minds of their base. In this case, that the entire Russia investigation and impeachments were bogus, fake, or political witch hunts. With these falsehoods, they hope to distract from Trump’s repeated and corrupt efforts to get help from foreign powers during two elections. Finally, they try to discredit those who are willing to speak the truth, so that no one knows who or what to believe. If they can take down the person, then they can discredit their ideas and hide their own wrongdoing. _It’s a lot, folks. It’s constant and never ending. And I’ll be honest, it takes a real toll on the truth._ These attacks work. Conservative voters who live in a bubble believe some of the worst lies and slanders about me. And others send me death threats. All because I am willing to stand up to Donald Trump, and fight to protect our democracy. And I’m not going to stop. But here’s why it really matters. I can take these attacks. But with every false story or misleading segment, our idea of shared truth is shredded. And nothing is more corrosive to a democracy than the idea that there is no truth. But we can fight back. I know that our voices, lifted together, are stronger than this right-wing Fox News Misinformation Machine. **That’s why I’m asking: will you pitch in a few dollars to our campaign right now? We need to fight these lies and smears with the truth.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38625598/316306017/-751938712?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211114_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzJmNmIxNS03ZTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b4adYGgfLdlNAoAB-laG9trPCfsYfFB0LzKYRq8wHKs=)
---

---
| [ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38625603/316306022/-751938712?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211114_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzJmNmIxNS03ZTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b4adYGgfLdlNAoAB-laG9trPCfsYfFB0LzKYRq8wHKs=)
---
Thank you for always having my back. Even if you can’t pitch in today, it means so much that you are in this fight with me and took the time to read this email.
We will do everything we can to fight their lies with the truth.
— Adam

name: Rep. Demings
subject: Re: I want you to hear this directly from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I cannot win in Florida without you.
| | |
---
Friend,

I want you to hear this directly from me: I cannot win in Florida without you. **And right now, as I'm coming up short of my mid month goal, I have nowhere else to turn. **
A recent poll of my race shows the numbers are close (I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio!). That's a statistical tie, but The Cook Political Report also increased my chances of winning. I need to surge _ahead_ , friend – _ _ and the only way to do it is hitting my $150,000 mid month fundraising goal. Missing this goal isn't an option.
Running a campaign in Florida is expensive – and Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points (_10,033 votes_), so every dollar will make a difference. With Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm pulling in a combined $32 million last quarter, **missing my goal could cost Floridians and our country a meaningful win.**
Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights. _Your_ support fueled The Cook Political Report to increase my odds of winning. And this grassroots team is the reason political pundits across the board are saying I have what it takes to defeat Sen. Marco Rubio.
So, friend, here I am, writing to you again. I know you hear a lot from me, but it's only because I _trust_ you and _believe_ that I can't do this without you. Please, if you can spare any donation before midnight to close our fundraising gap, it would mean the world to me.
Here's the best link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38626284/316312768/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1699-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWVmZjUyNC04NjQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHVvyMgmMqFmafrHOq_tZrNOfkLCJnyi38tZEzQ9hB0=)
Thank you so much for your support,

Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38626285/316312769/-144803992?refcode=jtk1699-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWVmZjUyNC04NjQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHVvyMgmMqFmafrHOq_tZrNOfkLCJnyi38tZEzQ9hB0=&emci=9b826066-3b42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=65eff524-8645-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9b826066-3b42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/65eff524-8645-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWVmZjUyNC04NjQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHVvyMgmMqFmafrHOq_tZrNOfkLCJnyi38tZEzQ9hB0=&id=123159867). name: Christie
subject: I selected you to represent Pennsylvania >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| [](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211114-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211114-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=1918%2E9716520%2Ea71O29)
---
Hi Friend -- I'm Christie Roberts and I'm the Executive Director of the DSCC. **That means it's my job to develop the Democratic Party's strategy to protect and expand our Senate majority.**

As you know, our majority is perilously thin and we can't afford to make _any_ mistakes. So I am inviting a few trusted Democrats from each state to join my personal Focus Group to help _perfect_ our strategy **\-- and I chose you specifically!**

[**I'm standing by to review your responses, so please click here to enter my focus group immediately >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211114-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211114-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=1918%2E9716520%2Ea71O29)

_*Note: I need to review your responses by tomorrow morning, so please don't wait!_

I helped guide Raphael Warnock's campaign and I cannot overstate how crucial this community's support and input were to our victories in Georgia. That's why I chose you for this exclusive opportunity -- I'm _100%_ confident your insights will drastically improve our strategy.

[**So please, will you accept this invitation to join my personal focus group before tonight's deadline?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211114-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211114-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=1918%2E9716520%2Ea71O29)

| **DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM**
**Focus Group Status: OPEN**
---

Thanks for all you do! I am eagerly awaiting your responses.

Christie Roberts
Executive Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2021-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=1918_9716520_a71O29&akid=1918%2E9716520%2Ea71O29)**.

name: Team Kelly
subject: Do you remember how you felt on November 4, 2020 at 12:02am?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Do you remember it? The sense of relief you felt when Mark Kelly was declared the winner in Arizona shortly after midnight on Election Night?
#

Friends —
Do you remember it? The sense of relief you felt when Mark Kelly was declared the winner in Arizona shortly after midnight on Election Night?
We were still waiting for the results of the presidential election, but can you remember how you felt when you knew Mark had won that seat?
Now think about the next election coming up. It’s less than a year away, so think about the stakes. Think about how you’ll feel as the results come in.
Now think about how you’ll feel when this Senate race is called.
How will you feel if Mark wins? How will you feel if Mark loses?
Because honestly, the outcome is up to you. Not exaggerating here — it’s the truth. And that’s why we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to an end tomorrow? We would not ask if it weren’t so critically important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211114-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1660_6688874_JXMcEk&akid=1660%2E6688874%2EJXMcEk)

My firewood guy is only delivering to regulars, and he only has a few months supply left.
