name: Jim Jordan
subject: I will never be silenced for doing my job, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760429:6bGm4x2sN:m:1:3253819041:0748C941B7BED8C7A2590212A563141E:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760429:6bGm4x2sN:m:1:3253819041:0748C941B7BED8C7A2590212A563141E:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760429:6bGm4x2sN:m:1:3253819041:0748C941B7BED8C7A2590212A563141E:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760429:6bGm4x2sN:m:1:3253819041:0748C941B7BED8C7A2590212A563141E:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760429:6bGm4x2sN:m:1:3253819041:0748C941B7BED8C7A2590212A563141E:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760429:6bGm4x2sN:m:1:3253819041:0748C941B7BED8C7A2590212A563141E:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS

* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.

* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760429:6bGm4x2sN:m:1:3253819041:0748C941B7BED8C7A2590212A563141E:r)**

clean_body: RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? {{unsubscribeUrl}} | Peter, They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again. RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points. The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties. whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years. My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job. I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic. Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down. No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. body:
Another Republican opponent filed his paperwork to run against Andy last week. Republicans think they have what it takes to defeat Andy and undo all the progress we've made for Kentuckians. Did you hear the news, Peter?

**Another Republican opponent filed his paperwork to run against Andy last week.** Republicans think they have what it takes to defeat Andy and undo all the progress we've made for Kentuckians.

We can't let that happen. That's why we set a goal to raise $10,000 before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help ensure we're prepared for whatever our opponents throw our way and keep Andy working to build a Commonwealth where all can live and thrive.

**[Will you chip in $5 or more before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help us hit our $10,000 goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38626667/316315585/-1771530716?refcode=em21_211114_mm1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211114_mm1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTNkYzVkNC04ZDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TosKUoPvZYGz4lrD_Ct3-H-1uomWhz-eb63xWL6DCCo=)**

Since taking office, Andy's enacted infrastructure reform, public education improvements, voting rights expansions, and supported Kentucky's economy through its best year on record. He's ready to keep fighting for progress, but keeping him in the governor's office will require a groundswell of support from folks like you.

With another opponent officially in the race, we know it's only a matter of time before the attacks and outside money flood our Commonwealth again. We have another tough fight ahead of us, so we're counting on your support to help us build another winning campaign.

**[Before our mid-month fundraising deadline, chip in $5 or more to help us prepare for the road ahead and keep Andy fighting for all Kentuckians.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38626668/316315586/-1771530716?refcode=em21_211114_mm1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211114_mm1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTNkYzVkNC04ZDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TosKUoPvZYGz4lrD_Ct3-H-1uomWhz-eb63xWL6DCCo=)**

Thanks,

Team Beshear | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. clean_body: Another Republican opponent filed his paperwork to run against Andy last week. Republicans think they have what it takes to defeat Andy and undo all the progress we've made for Kentuckians. Did you hear the news, Peter? Another Republican opponent filed his paperwork to run against Andy last week. Republicans think they have what it takes to defeat Andy and undo all the progress we've made for Kentuckians. We can't let that happen. That's why we set a goal to raise $10,000 before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help ensure we're prepared for whatever our opponents throw our way and keep Andy working to build a Commonwealth where all can live and thrive. = Since taking office, Andy's enacted infrastructure reform, public education improvements, voting rights expansions, and supported Kentucky's economy through its best year on record. He's ready to keep fighting for progress, but keeping him in the governor's office will require a groundswell of support from folks like you. With another opponent officially in the race, we know it's only a matter of time before the attacks and outside money flood our Commonwealth again. We have another tough fight ahead of us, so we're counting on your support to help us build another winning campaign. = Thanks, Team Beshear | | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign. = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38627119/316317183/-1406512299?refcode=ea.31ef7eec-8f45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.31ef7eec-8f45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.31ef7eec-8f45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWVmN2VlYy04ZjQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-AjnA8a7S0r0lzd541fXNtMbT1V3qS7UCzSqr4xgSIs=)

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2uskb--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uskb-1kro3-4qqlpo4/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uskb-1kro4-4qqlpo5/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uskb-1kro5-4qqlpo6/)
---

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uskb-1kro6-4qqlpo7/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uskb-1kro7-4qqlpo8/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uskb-1kro8-4qqlpo9/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

I need your help if we are going to **WIN BIG** for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. **[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uskb-1kroa-4qqlpo0/ "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**

name: Ali S. Zaidi, Team Collier
subject: Let’s talk about the numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
The numbers don’t lie. Support our work today by donating $5 or any amount toward our mid-month goal before tomorrow’s deadline >> |
#
---
Let’s talk about the numbers, folks.
* In **one month** , we have our big TEC quarter deadline when we’ll report our fundraising numbers before they go public.

* With less than **100 days** until our primary election, time is moving quickly. We’ll have to work harder in the coming months to keep up our organizing efforts.

* Mike takes**zero dollars** from corporate PACs (zip, zilch, nada)

* Grassroots donations are key to supporting our work — we’ve brought in over **13,136 individual donations** since the start of the campaign. We rely on folks like you to fuel our campaign, and we’re proud of it.

**The numbers don’t lie. 12,000
That’s how many contributions we need to reach before midnight tomorrow to stay on track to hit our November fundraising targets before the end of the month.

12,000 is an important number to us because each donation – no matter the amount – shows that our values from Medicare for All to the Green New Deal have strong support in your state and across the country.

body:

[We're doing everything we can to ramp up our campaign and meet this challenge - can you pitch in $22 right now to protect Josh's seat in 2022?](https://act.myngp.com/el/8sAFcWGFL88VgrfJujiVpsefb0UFyEpowYY42wch5LA=/rtjI7jdkFJTGaI8wsYgUgr5N58n22L2U6_3AxmsYYBw=?refcode=E12413-20211113-Nunes-SL-Opponent-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8sAFcWGFL88VgrfJujiVpsefb0UFyEpowYY42wch5LA=/rtjI7jdkFJTGaI8wsYgUgr5N58n22L2U6_3AxmsYYBw=?refcode=E12413-20211113-Nunes-graphic-Opponent-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20) We'll admit it - Representative Nunes would be a formidable opponent. He's backed by a $12 million war chest and a huge national following in the right wing media where he's an outspoken defender of Trump. And he's just about as extreme as they get: he's claimed that "global warming is nonsense" and even suggested that House Republicans' number-one focus should be on protecting Trump. In short, Peter, Nunes is dangerous. And because the latest draft maps propose shaping CA-10 to be redder than ever, he just might have a shot at unseating Josh. No matter what, we can't let that happen. We need to keep Josh in office so he can continue fighting for accessible healthcare, education, the environment, and more - it's what the folks in our district deserve, and we won't allow a far-right extremist to take over.
[And in order to stay competitive in this race, we need more resources ASAP. So please, if you are able, rush in a donation of any amount to strengthen our campaign and help us meet this moment.](https://act.myngp.com/el/8sAFcWGFL88VgrfJujiVpsefb0UFyEpowYY42wch5LA=/rtjI7jdkFJTGaI8wsYgUgr5N58n22L2U6_3AxmsYYBw=?refcode=E12413-20211113-Nunes-SL-Opponent-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) Our grassroots supporters have helped us beat back an extremist before, and we can do it again. _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/8sAFcWGFL88VgrfJujiVpsefb0UFyEpowYY42wch5LA=/rtjI7jdkFJTGaI8wsYgUgr5N58n22L2U6_3AxmsYYBw=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12413-20211113-Nunes-EG-Opponent-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**

name: Team Maggie
subject: 2022 is going to be tough for Democrats, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
**Team:_Roll Call_ just listed Maggie Hassan as one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection.** There's no doubt about it, the 2022 midterms are going to be tough for Democrats across the country, but especially in New Hampshire. Mitch McConnell is one seat away from taking back the Senate majority, and he's laser-focused on Maggie Hassan. Outside interest groups and GOP super PACs have been flooding New Hampshire with millions in dark money for months, and _we're still a year out from Election Day_. **[Before we go any further, can you chip $5 to help us hit our critical mid-month goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38627550/316320278/-1803038125?refcode=e2021114_rollcall-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmEwOTg0MC05NzQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-g35F9F7N1dZq3Uz5XjUWEZwiBbuaiGKyU88qMllRwA=)** | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38627551/316320279/-1803038125?refcode=e2021114_rollcall-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmEwOTg0MC05NzQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-g35F9F7N1dZq3Uz5XjUWEZwiBbuaiGKyU88qMllRwA=)
---
With our Senate split 50-50, losing in New Hampshire means losing our slim Senate majority and handing the gavel back to Mitch McConnell. Defending our Democratic majority is the only way we can stop McConnell from blocking Democrats' progress and enacting his extreme right-wing agenda. **What happens in New Hampshire could shape the course of our country for decades.**

name: American Victory on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance-
body:
| _Please view this message from our sponsor:_ | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763861:6wMeOx2TN:m:1:3298722022:D007FEEE9BEE8BFD2EF1F5CB32EF3E9E:r)
---
| | Are you proud to be an American citizen?
If you're like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can't say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can't say the same thing even today.
You don't have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It's one of our nation's great achievements.
But there's a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges.
And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty.
That's why today I hope you'll support our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763861:6wMeOx2TN:m:1:3298722022:D007FEEE9BEE8BFD2EF1F5CB32EF3E9E:r)**
This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.

* **The first important goal** of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through We must add hundreds of thousands more subscribers in 2022!
* **The second vital goal** is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal** is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and new Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans.
NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _your_ support is critical to our success.
With your help, we'll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens.
We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months.
**You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763861:6wMeOx2TN:m:1:3298722022:D007FEEE9BEE8BFD2EF1F5CB32EF3E9E:r)_
---
| | And for a gift of $100 or more, you'll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson's latest book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America._ Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He's also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale.
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763861:6wMeOx2TN:m:1:3298722022:D007FEEE9BEE8BFD2EF1F5CB32EF3E9E:r)
---
| | Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, "In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure. " **
Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government.
Warm regards,
Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58763861:6wMeOx2TN:m:1:3298722022:D007FEEE9BEE8BFD2EF1F5CB32EF3E9E:r)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Regarding my re-election campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again. RINOs and special interests in
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9fi04upgcik0kvnm4ufue283hgl5fffiq701h60_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjh69o34clh2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztbi6t0fkmaacpc2203rlpl69i66quetp838clk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjh69o34clh2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0psia9be067ah0q7bd1o6tjs3phng5f9c1vtu5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjh69o34clh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zufrjjap9qlem6rbsj7i4dle1qp1sqbliranotn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjh69o34clh2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z21k4o1ft5kbhkr4i51g5jpuu0u5fn5lmn1klo30_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjh69o34clh2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9qrtp0b95c0jjqsaocbasm5o2lt3brp5ff1mij0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjh69o34clh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5oqspr1esu9g0oe5u89lkd3kavim4dupipp978g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjh69o34clh2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z39uktnqadh0sghe0d15mba03gmvbmq92vpg2png_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjh69o34clh2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zq9hv16voc3qfvr280uccogp6g0bcoi38esmjgeo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjh69o34clh2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9k8g2fqitrnsmm4702udpg0h3hvm6mg6vb3b1v8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjh69o34clh2bs)

Delaware, OH 43015

clean_body: RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! | Fellow American, They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again. RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points. The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office - I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties. whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years. My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job. I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic. name: Cody Pruitt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

$0.05, Peter.

That’s how much it costs for our campaign to reach out to 1 voter in
Kentucky.

As the Organizing Director for this campaign, this number has been on the
top of my mind. Early and sustained voter outreach is going to be critical
so we can turnout newly engaged voters, raise up our voices this election,
and end Rand Paul’s dangerous and irresponsible lies.

So today I’m reaching out with an important request:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12863?refcode=em20211114-1228&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1228%2E346206%2EK4zp15 ]Peter, can
you be a sponsor of Jefferson County?

We’ve got about 632781 registered voters there. And at a cost of
roughly $0.05 per voter, we’ll need to raise about $31,639 to
cover our budget and reach every voter in Jefferson County.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12863?refcode=em20211114-1228&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1228%2E346206%2EK4zp15 ]Contribute $5

For too long, there’s been this myth that Kentucky is a red state. But
it’s not. It’s an unorganized, disenfranchised, and exploited state.

It’s one of the only states in the country with Republican senators and a
Democratic governor. Where the number of people who don’t vote outnumber
those who do. And when you look at recent political trends all the numbers
show that the tides are turning: we have a real chance to elect bold
progressive leadership in Kentucky and make history this election.

Rand Paul knows this. So his plan is to divide us, distract us from the
common bonds we share, and discourage us from voting. We’re seeing that
right now every time Rand Paul goes on live TV to spread misinformation
about COVID and attack safety measures like mask mandates. He’d rather
spread another dangerous lie than focus on the issues our families face.

That’s why early and sustained voter outreach is going to be a critical
part of our strategy to win. We’re bringing our campaign’s message for a
new kind of politics that centers working families to every corner of
Kentucky, from the hood to the holler.

We’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to power this historic
people-powered movement in Kentucky. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12863?refcode=em20211114-1228&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1228%2E346206%2EK4zp15 ]The price of reaching one voter in
Kentucky is $0.05 — so if you chip in $15, we’ll be able to reach 300
Kentuckians who may have never heard of Charles Booker before!

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12863?refcode=em20211114-1228&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1228%2E346206%2EK4zp15 ]Contribute $5

Let’s do this,

Cody
Organizing Director

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211114-1228-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1228_346206_K4zp15&akid=1228%2E346206%2EK4zp15

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1228%2E346206%2EK4zp15

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Team Morganize
subject: Can you help us stay on the road?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Costs like this add up, and we rely on our supporters to get back on the road
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211114-393-footer-ak&t=2&akid=393%2E90090%2EWVAFXq)
We’re campaigning across Ohio to amplify working-class issues every chance we get, regardless of what elites say an outsider candidate is capable of.
But running an outsider campaign to elect a candidate like Morgan isn’t easy, and being grassroots-funded means we rely on folks like you for _every_ cost we have.
Last week, Morgan visited striking Teamsters in Toledo to get a full download on the issues they were facing — **and on our way back, we got a flat tire.**
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14397?t=3&akid=393%2E90090%2EWVAFXq)
Costs like gas, fixing flat tires, and organizing meet and greets across the state of Ohio really start to add up. Without more support from our grassroots donors, we’d have to scale back our efforts to run a big, statewide campaign.
**[That’s why we’re reaching out to ask if you can chip in $5 right now to keep us on the road. Please, will you make a contribution today?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14397?t=4&akid=393%2E90090%2EWVAFXq)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14403?refcode=em20211114-393&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=393%2E90090%2EWVAFXq)**
There is a narrative out there that someone like Morgan can’t mobilize a multiracial working-class coalition. That’s mostly coming from the mainstream media and political elites – and let us tell you, they’re flat-out wrong.
Morgan knows through lived experience that uniting people behind an issue is way more important than what she looks like or where she comes from. That’s why our campaign is first and foremost centered around getting political and economic power back on the side of working families.
We can do that because we don’t spend our time cozying up to corporate PACs to cover our campaign costs. We’re funded by grassroots supporters giving whatever they can to a campaign they believe in, and that money goes right back toward getting around Ohio and mobilizing our supporters, no matter the obstacles (or flat tires!) in our way.
**[Will you consider making a contribution of any amount to keep us on the road and help us win in 2022?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14397?t=24&akid=393%2E90090%2EWVAFXq)**
Thank you for your support!
Team Morganize
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14397?t=25&akid=393%2E90090%2EWVAFXq)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211114-393-footer&t=26&refcode2=393_90090_WVAFXq&akid=393%2E90090%2EWVAFXq)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=393%2E90090%2EWVAFXq)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: Brandon, Team MLG
subject: Gov. Lujan Grisham is calling on you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
Hi, Peter – did you see our last message? Gov. Lujan Grisham asked you to donate $20 before our fundraising blackout, **but my team just pulled your records, and here's what we're seeing:**
---
| | **SUPPORTER RECORD**
---
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
STATUS: ** PENDING**
DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.
---
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38627898/316322391/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=20&refcode=jtk1099-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTk5OTU5Ny05ZTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLszddaJcZuXeAZa_93knDS4tDuEijj9mlVfKG19JBc=)
---
In just a few short weeks, our team won't be able to fundraise for three whole months because of a special legislative session. This is bad news, Peter: If we don't hit our goal before the end of this month, our resources will dry up during the blackout and we won't be able to defend our state from GOP extremism.
**Everything from voting rights to reproductive freedom is on the line in this race, so Gov. Lujan Grisham is counting on YOU to keep New Mexico blue:[Please, will you donate $20 today to defend New Mexico from the GOP?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38627899/316322394/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=20&refcode=jtk1099-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTk5OTU5Ny05ZTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLszddaJcZuXeAZa_93knDS4tDuEijj9mlVfKG19JBc=)**
Thanks for your support,

Brandon
Digital Director
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Michelle Lujan Grisham**
Date: Sun, Nov 14, 2021
Subject: December is coming
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38627900/316322396/-1540418300?amount=20&refcode=jtk1099-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTk5OTU5Ny05ZTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLszddaJcZuXeAZa_93knDS4tDuEijj9mlVfKG19JBc=)
---
I'm about to ask you for $20, Peter – but first, I want to explain why:
**When our legislative session begins in January, we won't be able to fundraise for several months, but the fundraising blackout may begin as early as December.[So I'm asking every supporter to pitch in $20 today to help us raise as much as we can before the end of the year. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38627901/316322398/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=20&refcode=jtk1099-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTk5OTU5Ny05ZTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLszddaJcZuXeAZa_93knDS4tDuEijj9mlVfKG19JBc=)**
Our grassroots movement has already done so much for the people of New Mexico: We’ve had the most successful vaccination campaign in the country, invested in our schools and educators, raised the minimum wage for the first time in a decade, and provided crucial relief for small businesses during the pandemic.
But there’s still so much work to be done –** and that means we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to pass our bold agenda.** If New Mexico flips red, all of our progress could be undone.
I know December sounds far off, but for our finance team, it's right around the corner. They tell me that if we don't hit our fundraising goals this month, we'll have to face some tough decisions about our outreach efforts as this election heats up.
**So, I'm turning to my strongest supporters today for your help. **Your $20 is all we need to hit our $22,000 goal and continue working on our bold, progressive agenda for New Mexico. **Please, Peter, I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important:**
**[We only have until midnight tomorrow to reach our goal. Will you donate $20 right now to keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38627902/316322400/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=20&refcode=jtk1099-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTk5OTU5Ny05ZTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLszddaJcZuXeAZa_93knDS4tDuEijj9mlVfKG19JBc=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38627903/316322403/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=20&refcode=jtk1099-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTk5OTU5Ny05ZTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLszddaJcZuXeAZa_93knDS4tDuEijj9mlVfKG19JBc=)
---
None of the work we've accomplished would have been possible without your help. I can't thank you enough for your grassroots support.

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1ce455c3-5042-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/ba999597-9e45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTk5OTU5Ny05ZTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLszddaJcZuXeAZa_93knDS4tDuEijj9mlVfKG19JBc=&id=127162320) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
---

name: Val Demings
subject: Friend, I'll make it quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio
| | |
---
Friend – sorry to drop in, but I'll make it quick: I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the Florida Senate race that can determine our majority.
**But ****I'm falling $49,876 short of my mid-month fundraising goal ****– and I can't win without your immediate support. I**** just pulled your supporter record, and I saw this:**
| | Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Suggested contribution: $5
Today's donation: **PENDING**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38628261/316323784/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1640-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjcyMTI0Yi05ZjQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cgAQ5NZUeQdiIZz1sT1rBXByyxJSFTHulpoUCeaueio=)
---
Donations from your state: 72% to goal
**Deadline: 11:59 p.m.**
---
If there's one thing we should learn from recent headlines, it's that every Democrat needs to get off the sidelines if we want to build back better, friend. Republicans are spending millions to dismantle our majorities in Congress, and we need all hands on deck to fight back.
The last Senate race in Florida was decided by just over 10,000 votes – and our Senate majority hinges on just one seat. That means we need the resources to reach as many voters as we can – because cutting even one phone-banking session or field organizer risks losing us this race and our Senate majority.
**I know our people-powered campaign has what it takes to beat Marco Rubio. Roll Call is calling Rubio the second-most vulnerable GOP incumbent – but I need your help to raise $49,876 more before our mid-month deadline to climb ahead in the polls and defend the Senate from the GOP:**
**[Please, friend, can you donate $5? In a race as close as this one, anything you can give will make the difference in flipping Florida blue. It could be YOUR donation that gives us the final push we need to set the groundwork to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38628262/316323785/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1640-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjcyMTI0Yi05ZjQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cgAQ5NZUeQdiIZz1sT1rBXByyxJSFTHulpoUCeaueio=)**
I can't thank you enough for your support,

Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38628263/316323786/-144803992?refcode=jtk1640-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjcyMTI0Yi05ZjQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cgAQ5NZUeQdiIZz1sT1rBXByyxJSFTHulpoUCeaueio=&emci=b9349dd2-c541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=5272124b-9f45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b9349dd2-c541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/5272124b-9f45-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjcyMTI0Yi05ZjQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cgAQ5NZUeQdiIZz1sT1rBXByyxJSFTHulpoUCeaueio=&id=123159867). name: Mark Kelly
subject: please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
It would be the honor of a lifetime to serve Arizona for a full term, but I can’t do that alone.
#
Peter,
In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to support my reelection campaign in Arizona and Patty Murray’s in Washington state before midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here’s the truth:
We’re less than one year out from Election Day. And when the clock strikes midnight, our mid-month fundraising deadline comes to an end.
But this goal is important for a few more reasons.
First, a National Republican Super PAC is running ads to defeat me in this race, and we need the resources to withstand the attack.
Now, the reason we’re facing so many attacks is because CNN ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2022. And our official race ranking just changed from Lean Democratic to Pure Toss Up.
But our secret weapon against the corporate special interests is you. Because if we have the resources we need, we’re going to win.
It would be the honor of a lifetime to serve Arizona for a full term, but I can’t do that alone. So here’s where I ask:
**[Can you please split a $5 contribution to Patty Murray and our campaign before the end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to an end at midnight tonight? I would not ask if it weren’t so important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38628636/316325435/1273598614?refcode=pm_em_211114_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjVlYmY5My1hNTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=54rPfmYooBNuXF4Yf829O5EPDkUOa28Km9lKcPM7G-w=)**
Thank you,
Mark Kelly
** **
** **
** **
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38628637/316325436/1273598614?refcode=pm_em_211114_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjVlYmY5My1hNTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=54rPfmYooBNuXF4Yf829O5EPDkUOa28Km9lKcPM7G-w=)****

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: I just received an upsetting text message (read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | Peter, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760476:61Bwgx2pN:m:1:3253819041:878F116028FFBB26BFFC9BD71E025481:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760476:61Bwgx2pN:m:1:3253819041:878F116028FFBB26BFFC9BD71E025481:r "Generic
Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760476:61Bwgx2pN:m:1:3253819041:878F116028FFBB26BFFC9BD71E025481:r "Can I count on
you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the
fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760476:61Bwgx2pN:m:1:3253819041:878F116028FFBB26BFFC9BD71E025481:r "BUT, if every
patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in
the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: asking for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | I don't have a second to spare.

I'm just 24 hours away from my Mid Month Deadline, and I'm still alarmingly short of my must-hit goal. **So I 'm coming directly to you with my most important request yet:

[Can you chip in $5 to defend our House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/9b46T4X-~)**
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $5_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-2sp~)
---

Let me explain why your $5 could not be more urgent right now.

I just watched Republicans unveil a gut-wrenching plan to defeat **70 of my most vulnerable Democrats**.

And to make matters worse, they've amassed a **$65 million war chest** to pull it all off.

Hear me: **I will fight against these Republicans and their attempts to buy their way back into the Majority if it 's the last thing I do.**

But I can't do it alone: I need my best supporters -- including YOU -- behind me at this make-or-break moment.

[**So I 'm asking one last time: Before my deadline in just 24 hours, can I count on you to rush just $5 -- or whatever you can spare -- to defend my House Democrats and save our Majority once and for all?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/NaPAfrq_)
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $5 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfwkxG-M-)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_aGxf2q4N-)

| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)

| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-j8p~)
---
| [**Or chip in another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)
---

Thanks,

DCCC

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. name: Roger Misso
subject: We just endorsed the candidate who will help us win the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/kypxFsfW1zAXCX99kU0uQ9GZlhYlXEsWv_oUmR2VvcA=)

Peter,

With dysfunction in the Senate on full display over the past few months, it's clear that electing as many candidates of honor and integrity to that institution is a priority.

[_**That 's why we are proud to announce our endorsement of Lucas Kunce for US Senate in Missouri.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/kypxFsfW1zAXCX99kU0uQ9GZlhYlXEsWv_oUmR2VvcA=)

Lucas served our country for 13 years as a Marine, deploying to Iraq and Afghanistan. And, when he came home, he didn't stop defending American values. Instead, he joined the American Economic Liberties Project to fight against corporate monopolies and greed, leveling the playing field for American workers.

Lucas will likely face Eric Greitens in November. You might remember him as [the disgraced politician who blindfolded and sexually assaulted a woman](https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/V5gyTxKjrHCX6zBjuMy_67OLNwNBSPfIaGol2PfTXqM=) while elected. He's backed by millions of dollars from [the same people who bankrolled the January 6th insurrection rally.](https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/RcAbrSUQnYGFvTtfumFONzCTI2TK5bg_KULWNd50NHs=) And he has no business anywhere near the Senate.

We aren't just supporting Lucas because he is a veteran. [_**We are supporting him because he is a person of honor and integrity, proven many times over in acts of thankless service both in and out of uniform.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/kypxFsfW1zAXCX99kU0uQ9GZlhYlXEsWv_oUmR2VvcA=)

Today, [_**we are asking you to split a contribution between Lucas & Taking the Hill PAC.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/kypxFsfW1zAXCX99kU0uQ9GZlhYlXEsWv_oUmR2VvcA=) Lucas needs your support to get his message out to Missouri voters early and often. And we need your support [_**to fund deep canvassing efforts in Missouri to persuade independent veteran and military family vot**_ _**ers to support him!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/kypxFsfW1zAXCX99kU0uQ9GZlhYlXEsWv_oUmR2VvcA=)

[_**Will you split a donation between Taking the Hill PAC and the Lucas Kunce for Senate campaign right now?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/kypxFsfW1zAXCX99kU0uQ9GZlhYlXEsWv_oUmR2VvcA=)

Now is not the time to sit on the sidelines. Now is the time to act, [_**to give**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/kypxFsfW1zAXCX99kU0uQ9GZlhYlXEsWv_oUmR2VvcA=) , and to work so that we can ensure a majority of honor and integrity in the US Senate.

[_**Please join us in supporting Lucas by making your contribution now!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/kypxFsfW1zAXCX99kU0uQ9GZlhYlXEsWv_oUmR2VvcA=)

[_****_](https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/kypxFsfW1zAXCX99kU0uQ9GZlhYlXEsWv_oUmR2VvcA=)

Yours in service,
Roger

_Roger Misso_
_Executive Director_
_Taking the Hill
[@RogerMissoCNY](https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/lJfXNXuWYw63tMejDtfR3Dx7PyCCdUo46nN-adqsJhY=)_

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/rUHZj2D6SuuQEX8Acgv9COF2XhA9a9ESOEKCegaFXNw= "https://act.myngp.com/el/op7rnYst1LGMCJefaCUDr-bSKiAiwkAihb1PnFVVCuI=/rUHZj2D6SuuQEX8Acgv9COF2XhA9a9ESOEKCegaFXNw=").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

clean_body: We’re taking a look at our September fundraising so far. | | | We’ll be honest: We’re behind where we need to be right now. From day one, Kina made the pledge that she wouldn’t take one dime from corporate PACs, unlike our opponent Rep. Danny Davis, who has accepted corporate money for decades. Our campaign is funded 100% by grassroots supporters. Everyday people who give what they can to help send Kina to Congress. We’re taking a look at our fundraising here on the finance team, and we need more supporters to chip in, in order to continue our efforts. ****If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: As we head into 2022, we are gearing up for some serious campaigning – petition season starts in January. Our opponent will be ready, and we need to be as well. We are building our field team, we’ve called tens of thousands of voters, and we are beginning to knock doors. Every dollar helps us pay one more organizer; call 25 more voters; print 5 more flyers for when we knock doors.That’s why your donation is so powerful right now. We couldn’t do this without you! Folks, it’s been a busy few weeks and our work isn’t over yet. That’s why I’m reaching out — **our campaign is up against our critical mid-quarter deadline tomorrow.** **[I’m going to ask you to chip in toward our goal in a moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38629046/316335735/1569722553?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20211114_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGFhOWFiZS1hYTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9T0NqFN2RkJXFY5ZCnw2ppeCwHxIwDqRmirdk-fxIU4=) But first, let me share what your contribution makes possible.** I’ve been fighting to include important climate measures in the once-in-a-generation _Build Back Better Act_. That includes putting money back in the pockets of people who invest in electrifying their homes and vehicles. A few weeks ago, we helped elect strong Democrats in local New Mexico races, from candidates for city council to mayor to the soil and water conservation boards. And I took part in the COP26 climate summit, helping the U.S. lead by example in sharing our plans to cut emissions and address the climate crisis. Lastly, we just celebrated the passage of the historic bipartisan infrastructure bill that will invest billions of dollars in New Mexico’s infrastructure — from improving access to clean drinking water and repairing outdated roads and bridges to expanding broadband access. **These are huge wins for New Mexico and our country.** Now, we need to build on all we’ve accomplished by finally passing the _Build Back Better Act_ , taking bolder steps to tackle climate change, supporting more crucial races up and down the ballot, and more. But I’m counting on your support to power this work. **So, here’s that ask I promised you: Can you chip in any amount toward our fundraising goal? It’s our last mid-quarter deadline of the year and it’s important we meet it to keep our work on track as we head into 2022.** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38629047/316335736/1569722553?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20211114_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGFhOWFiZS1hYTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9T0NqFN2RkJXFY5ZCnw2ppeCwHxIwDqRmirdk-fxIU4=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38629048/316335737/1569722553?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20211114_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGFhOWFiZS1hYTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9T0NqFN2RkJXFY5ZCnw2ppeCwHxIwDqRmirdk-fxIU4=)

clean_body: Folks, it’s been a busy few weeks and our work isn’t over yet. That’s why I’m reaching out — our campaign is up against our critical mid-quarter deadline tomorrow. = But first, let me share what your contribution makes possible. I’ve been fighting to include important climate measures in the once-in-a-generation Build Back Better Act. That includes putting money back in the pockets of people who invest in electrifying their homes and vehicles. A few weeks ago, we helped elect strong Democrats in local New Mexico races, from candidates for city council to mayor to the soil and water conservation boards. And I took part in the COP26 climate summit, helping the U.S. lead by example in sharing our plans to cut emissions and address the climate crisis. Lastly, we just celebrated the passage of the historic bipartisan infrastructure bill that will invest billions of dollars in New Mexico’s infrastructure — from improving access to clean drinking water and repairing outdated roads and bridges to expanding broadband access. These are huge wins for New Mexico and our country. Now, we need to build on all we’ve accomplished by finally passing the Build Back Better Act , taking bolder steps to tackle climate change, supporting more crucial races up and down the ballot, and more. But I’m counting on your support to power this work. So, here’s that ask I promised you: Can you chip in any amount toward our fundraising goal? It’s our last mid-quarter deadline of the year and it’s important we meet it to keep our work on track as we head into 2022. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you. Any amount you give, whether it’s $5, $10, or more, makes a real difference. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . Hello --

Here’s the deal: tomorrow is our mid-month fundraising deadline and we’re
$6,254 behind.

If we fall short of our crucial goal, we risk the GOP winning this race
and retaking the Senate majority. We’ve seen the Republican playbook,
folks. They call up their wealthy friends to bankroll nasty
attack ads in an attempt to buy this election.

We can’t afford to miss a single fundraising deadline while our GOP
opponents rake in big bucks from shady special interests. If we don’t have
the resources to combat their attacks, we’re toast.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5888?t=1007&akid=1441%2E3611125%2EKjWA_a ]Can you rush a donation to help us meet our goal and expand our
Democratic Senate majority?

subject: Republicans are not the ones delivering for families.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | Kevin McCarthy says House Republicans will soon unveil a _"Parent's Bill of Rights"_ as he works furiously to become Speaker of the House.
What could they _possibly_ put in it?
McCarthy's Republicans oppose the expanded Child Tax Credit, which is giving families an additional $300 per child, per month. They oppose paid family leave, canceling student debt, universal pre-K, universal childcare, and free community college. **
** **As a mom of 3, progressive Democrat Melanie D’Arrigo is actually fighting for our families. And she needs your help to win her race for Congress.**
****[**Friend, help elect Melanie to Congress. They’re hoping to weaponize fear and disinformation about “critical race theory” in our schools to take over Congress.

**To pass truly equitable, pro-parent policies, we need to elect more progressive moms who are _actually_ fighting for our families like Melanie. **

clean_body: | | | Kevin McCarthy says House Republicans will soon unveil a "Parent's Bill of Rights" as he works furiously to become Speaker of the House. What could they possibly put in it? McCarthy's Republicans oppose the expanded Child Tax Credit, which is giving families an additional $300 per child, per month. They oppose paid family leave, canceling student debt, universal pre-K, universal childcare, and free community college. As a mom of 3, progressive Democrat Melanie D’Arrigo is actually fighting for our families. And she needs your help to win her race for Congress. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | Republicans say they’re fighting for families -- but what they’re really fighting is a culture war. They’re hoping to weaponize fear and disinformation about “critical race theory” in our schools to take over Congress. To pass truly equitable, pro-parent policies, we need to elect more progressive moms who are actually fighting for our families like Melanie. ** \-- D’Arrigo for Congress is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. name: Matt's iPhone
subject: Coming up on this checkpoint
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | Peter
---
| Since America First is coming up on its next major checkpoint tomorrow, I'm reaching out quickly today to make sure support for our movement doesn't slip.
Just last week, Trump's base of everyday conservative patriots like you delivered a Red Wave that rippled across the country...
We rejected Joe Biden's corrupt, far-left agenda in a way that shocked the Fake News media!
Build on this Victory: [https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/email-mid-month-nov](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RWoSbu-QL0Dn55k686EUE0fz3vSUtCUPirEpvVny5T9h9PsOYZfZ6cvlfPk4q0ylD_WJRDz1tl9vPeQwVEFio2mJDoB35M9cq_fSoHsvEP9NdQNYwb30E-Zfa5gRSPF2UfEDktjPiTJBJ5N49ZbIEpuZnMkbCenHIh7JqEbiyUK8nrcpwfSe9Q==&c=LSRBgqblJJwTaYWfJmRQSlQbmLiGsH8A05Y6PngN4XYfFWxVcur1oA==&ch=5TkO0lZ62hT2NtFsS-dkxemcdw5_SqiM5Y95zr8rz54xuLtKZYvysw==)
But we need to capitalize and build on this momentum - especially since rising prices are still crushing Americans, a porous Southern Border is putting us at risk, and the Deep State and the FBI are targeting Trump supporters and conservative viewpoints.
So can I count on you to keep building our support and make sure we're prepared for all the fights ahead?
Help Our Movement Reach the Next Goal! [https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/email-mid-month-nov](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RWoSbu-QL0Dn55k686EUE0fz3vSUtCUPirEpvVny5T9h9PsOYZfZ6cvlfPk4q0ylD_WJRDz1tl9vPeQwVEFio2mJDoB35M9cq_fSoHsvEP9NdQNYwb30E-Zfa5gRSPF2UfEDktjPiTJBJ5N49ZbIEpuZnMkbCenHIh7JqEbiyUK8nrcpwfSe9Q==&c=LSRBgqblJJwTaYWfJmRQSlQbmLiGsH8A05Y6PngN4XYfFWxVcur1oA==&ch=5TkO0lZ62hT2NtFsS-dkxemcdw5_SqiM5Y95zr8rz54xuLtKZYvysw==)

Thanks for your support before tomorrow's deadline!
-Matt Gaetz

name: Team Nikki
subject: What a waste of time (and money!)
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team—

Tomorrow, Ron DeSantis’ costly and wasteful special legislative session begins.

What’s on the agenda? Nothing good.

Instead of protecting voting rights, legalizing marijuana, supporting small businesses, or providing relief to working families, DeSantis called this special session to ban private employers from taking steps to protect their employees from COVID-19 because he cares more about his political ambition than the safety of Floridians!

DeSantis is waging an all-out war on businesses and workers. When Nikki is Governor, she’ll support small businesses, protect workers, and end the era of partisan gamesmanship in Tallahassee. Can you chip in now to help her win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-21?refcode=1112john]

The contrast couldn’t be clearer: since taking office, Nikki has protected our environment, kicked the NRA out of gun permitting, and fought for justice.
Ron DeSantis has played politics.

This week’s special session is a great reminder that it’s time for something new in Florida. That’s exactly what Nikki will bring as Governor. Click here to chip in now and help us break Florida’s rigged system. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-21?refcode=1114specialsession]

Thanks for fighting with us on this. We couldn’t do it without you.

—Team Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

Hey Peter, I’m Mark Takano and I’m proudly Japanese-American.

Like many Americans, my family pursued the American Dream. Eventually, they were successful. But, there was no shortage of obstacles.

Painfully, my grandparents and parents were all sent to Japanese internment camps during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything and had no choice but to rebuild their entire lives after the war.

**But now, I’m a U.S. Congressman, honored to represent CA-41 in Congress -- and I’m asking for your support.**

American families like mine have come so far due to progressive and inclusive policies. And I’m working everyday in Congress to keep fighting for policies that further uplift and protect our diverse communities. [**But Peter, I can’t do it without your support -- so can I count on you to chip in $3 right now and help me build an America that is welcoming and prosperous for all families? name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: re: this is what keeps me fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I know a thing or two about persevering, and winning, even if the odds are stacked against me.
| | |
---
Friend: Each and every day it is not lost on me that I'm in what will undoubtedly be the most expensive 2022 race for the U.S. Senate – a race that can decide the Senate majority and will be anything but easy.
But I know a thing or two about persevering, and _winning_ , even if the odds are stacked against me.
I've overcome plenty of adversity in my life, friend. **There is nothing easy about growing up as a poor, Black girl in the segregated South.** But my family's faith, and faith in opportunity, taught me perseverance. It was my family, particularly my mother's words of "Never tire of doing good, Val" that pushed me to where I am.
I carry the spirit of her words with me even today – as I reflect about my career of service to Floridians and my path to being a candidate for U.S. Senate.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38629398/316347002/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1700-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTdlMzYwYi1iMDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FcFyxqh9SPYRTO5pILqmuEmLiodvzemkq3-TQkwegbE=)
**There was nothing easy about being a first-generation college graduate** – nor was it easy working my way up the ranks of the Orlando Police Department. For 27 years, I served when it wasn't exactly ordinary to see a woman on the force, let alone a Black woman. But I never tired, and eventually, I became the first woman to lead my department as chief of police.
And friend, I know firsthand there's nothing easy about winning elections in Florida. My first run for Congress was one of my toughest fights – but even in defeat I never tired because I knew I could do good for my community. And it certainly wasn't easy to hold a lawless president – a habitual offender – to account. But I served as an impeachment manager, prosecuting Donald Trump in the Senate because no one should be above the law.
My road to this moment was not easy. But I'm not sure that there’s anywhere except America where a little Black girl – the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the '60s South – could have a story so filled with opportunities like these. And I am determined to meet this moment, to win, to never tire of doing good, so that anyone can have a story of opportunity.
This may be my toughest challenge yet, which is why I'm urging you – every last person reading this email – to chip in whatever they can to ensure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and win in Florida: [**Please, will you give $5 or more to help me flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar you give increases our ability to compete and win this tough battleground race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38629399/316347003/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1700-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTdlMzYwYi1iMDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FcFyxqh9SPYRTO5pILqmuEmLiodvzemkq3-TQkwegbE=)
With so much gratitude for all you do,

–Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38629401/316347004/-144803992?refcode=jtk1700-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTdlMzYwYi1iMDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FcFyxqh9SPYRTO5pILqmuEmLiodvzemkq3-TQkwegbE=&emci=a88b6928-3c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d97e360b-b045-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a88b6928-3c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/d97e360b-b045-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTdlMzYwYi1iMDQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FcFyxqh9SPYRTO5pILqmuEmLiodvzemkq3-TQkwegbE=&id=123159867). Whether it’s taking on police brutality and racism or fighting for every child to have access to a world class education, Tom always has the backs of hardworking Marylanders. **Now, I need you to have his:**

Peter -- I hate to email you on a Sunday, but this is important.

**We’re coming up on a critical Mid-Month Fundraising Deadline, and we need to raise $20,000 by midnight by tomorrow.**

**[Please, if you have anything to spare -- even if it’s just $1 -- it will go so far to make sure we have the funds to stay in this race and defeat my opponent, MAGA Republican Devin Nunes. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38629533/316351876/-139682337?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20211114_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTA4MzE4MS1iNTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSTvQ6d3WPkGnZB6XwhsEodeRvUD6XbrP_pqT6jue28=)** | [$20,000 MID-MONTH GOAL: CHIP IN $3 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38629534/316351877/-139682337?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20211114_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTA4MzE4MS1iNTQ1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSTvQ6d3WPkGnZB6XwhsEodeRvUD6XbrP_pqT6jue28=)

A couple of days ago, released preliminary district drafts showed Nunes’s district as one of the most competitive districts in all of California -- _the district could swing in the double digits towards Democrats!_

**This means Nunes is more vulnerable than ever.** With new district maps in our favor, we need to capitalize on this historic opportunity and invest in this race _right now._

Unlike Nunes, _I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money,_ so I’m relying on supporters like you to help me thwart Nunes’s attacks and flip this seat.

**[I’m personally asking you to step up: Can you pitch in $3 -- or whatever you can afford -- to oust my Republican opponent Devin Nunes? Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband.
