clean_body: | = Peter -- I hate to email you on a Sunday, but this is important. We’re coming up on a critical Mid-Month Fundraising Deadline, and we need to raise $20,000 by midnight by tomorrow. = | = A couple of days ago, released preliminary district drafts showed Nunes’s district as one of the most competitive districts in all of California -- the district could swing in the double digits towards Democrats! This means Nunes is more vulnerable than ever. With new district maps in our favor, we need to capitalize on this historic opportunity and invest in this race right now. Unlike Nunes, I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, so I’m relying on supporters like you to help me thwart Nunes’s attacks and flip this seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Every dollar makes a difference. I can’t thank you enough, Phil | | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: Devin Nunes is terrified of losing to us. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: Devin Nunes is vulnerable, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat him. Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust the worst MAGA Republican in Congress, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Click here to . | | = =

name: Devin Nunes
subject: I am personally asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The clock runs out at midnight, so I won’t ask again
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2uu12--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|
| | | It’s Devin Nunes, and today I am personally reaching out to ask for your help. Don’t ignore this message. It’s critical:
**We are only FIVE seats away from taking back the House for conservatives. That means just FIVE seats are standing in the way of DEFENDING Trump’s legacy, FIRING Pelosi, and DEMOLISHING the radical Left’s socialist agenda once and for all.**

---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uu12-1ks0k-4qqlpo4/ "Generic Button")
---

If we miss even one deadline and fall behind, we put victory in jeopardy. With so much at stake, it’s simply a risk we can’t take. **[As a TOP trusted patriot, can I count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uu12-1ks0l-4qqlpo5/ "As a TOP trusted patriot, can I count on you to step up? ")**

With your help, we can **[STOP THE SPREAD OF SOCIALISM – but you have to act now.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uu12-1ks0m-4qqlpo6/ "STOP THE SPREAD OF SOCIALISM – but you have to act now.")**

---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uu12-1ks0n-4qqlpo7/ "Generic Button")
---

By stepping up today you help ensure conservative patriots across the nation have the required resources to stand up to the Left’s attacks. You’re helping top-targeted candidates in MUST-WIN special elections secure victory and sending sorely needed reinforcements to MUST-FLIP races.

The Democrats are doing everything in their power to ERASE Trump’s legacy and will not stop until they’ve undone every last conservative achievement.

**[Help protect President Trump’s legacy. House Conservatives need your support NOW.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uu12-1ks0o-4qqlpo8/ "Fellow American, help protect President Trump’s legacy. House Conservatives need your support NOW. ")**

Pelosi is CLINGING to the smallest majority in decades. We’ve never had a better chance to restore our America First agenda.

The clock runs out at midnight, so I won’t ask again. **[Can I count on you to stand with Trump and House conservatives?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uu12-1ks0p-4qqlpo9/ "Can I count on you to stand with Trump and House conservatives?")**

Thank you,

Devin Nunes

---
|

**We urgently need your help.**
We have an opportunity next November to defeat Chuck Grassley and guarantee Democrats hold onto our Senate majority for another two years. **Admiral Mike Franken recently announced he’s running in Iowa, and the latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows only 27% of voters want to reelect Grassley!**
There’s never been a better chance to defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue, but Chuck Grassley has over $3 million in his campaign war chest thanks to his Wall Street donors, Big Pharma, and the NRA.
**Mike is facing his first mid-month deadline of the campaign tomorrow, but right now we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win. If Mike Franken is going to defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic majority, he is counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now.**

clean_body: | | | | Hello, We urgently need your help. We have an opportunity next November to defeat Chuck Grassley and guarantee Democrats hold onto our Senate majority for another two years. Admiral Mike Franken recently announced he’s running in Iowa, and the latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows only 27% of voters want to reelect Grassley! There’s never been a better chance to defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue, but Chuck Grassley has over $3 million in his campaign war chest thanks to his Wall Street donors, Big Pharma, and the NRA. Mike is facing his first mid-month deadline of the campaign tomorrow, but right now we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win. If Mike Franken is going to defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic majority, he is counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now. name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: Can you take our November Issues Survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
It’s important to Alex that we know where you stand on these issues
#

Hey there —
As you may know, once per month or so, Alex asks us to send around an Issue Survey to some of his top supporters.
We’ll be reading every answer and sharing the results with Alex on Monday, so this is the time to make your voice heard on the issues you care about most!
[**Can you take our quick November Issues Survey? We’ll be sharing the results with Alex on Monday, so we’re hoping for a LOT of responses before the weekend comes to a close.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/November-Issue-Survey?source=em211114-1-15&refcode2=449.159979.p8QVKJ&t=1&akid=449%2E159979%2Ep8QVKJ)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/November-Issue-Survey?source=em211114-1-15&refcode2=449.159979.p8QVKJ&t=2&akid=449%2E159979%2Ep8QVKJ)**
The truth is, grassroots supporters like you are vital to our campaign. So whether it’s making sure we respond to the climate crisis with the urgency it requires, or protecting and expanding the right to vote, or something else entirely, we want to hear from _you_ about what _you_ care about most.
Your input today will help Alex as he works in the Senate, and it will help us build a stronger campaign — one that’s focused on the priorities of our movement and that has what it takes to reach folks in every corner of the state and get them involved.
Thank you in advance for making your voice heard!
— Team Padilla
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/November-Issue-Survey?source=em211114-1-15&refcode2=449.159979.p8QVKJ&t=3&akid=449%2E159979%2Ep8QVKJ)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=449%2E159979%2Ep8QVKJ)

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Who do you think is going to win?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
Last week, a political spectator far smarter than me laid it out in these terms --- and I’m paraphrasing: if Republicans nationwide outperformed 2020 I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=6f34d44c099949fba5e5ca9bb57d007d&_e=oZww9JfPwId6Cxo3HPp2QS6gO74dW-orbGApVnWCFgcCP03ag_NdbAlwtVQ67DJK0JV15u65cHD9CbuewLpGdeYr2CqwGavNlEKOxcSy62yJQ8rsSMesQeQlNXIcM4Bqa1uvxxtuLsU7vgyNCHLty_a0OlmR2cdmR20BtvTzV-8iaSRAOehcM-utNfmWrNHcffY8HBkRYXu09DT9JRmiJDm-lRYazenbdrFOLND0u9R2i2j92rmFDoVqvBx4AHkrGnO2gG3OBi3qX_MgtCSt27eqTtzsrMLs6RZ3baBSynQN2PGaNrfiTjnEf5R1h3OMBV_mlQ_aQFP8RHXQ6WEX3Z7WSZV8wi3lUedXXaL13RtraipDOJpeO14HTszyRWp0fZ1jwlg0tDKHEJ-DVwjgu-nItitfXqFeb-z-rcdfuwWpqsDk0PwjPEfHYOms-GZxLGYVrgUPH_1jeoqUSxqb9vERuxNQy35wAMiLNsbMxHx9XY5mPwxt0BIWpO1qHox00eK4R52Gm5u0E_NjaOHftA9IU_pVyUp_8ucMkxby_eJZvh3OUAHLQ4jZ1jiiHDSh8c8ydc151RRfKoglgXB8RRC8ZGQy1DvOAPTu-Lk4sRA%3D)
---
Peter,

This week marks one year until the 2022 midterm elections that will decide whether we’re able to maintain our position as s center-right nation, or whether we’ll embrace the far-Left policies of the Biden Administration.

It goes without saying that I’m a proponent of conservatism in the United States – and if the results of last Tuesday’s election in Virginia were any sign – I’m not alone.

Last week, a political spectator far smarter than me laid it out in these terms --- and I’m paraphrasing: if Republicans nationwide outperformed 2020 numbers at the same level Virginia candidates did last week -- +12.3 pts – _**Republicans would pick up 51 seats in the House of representatives**_.

**[I want to know what you think: Are you expecting the House to flip Republican next year?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=6f34d44c099949fba5e5ca9bb57d007d&_e=oZww9JfPwId6Cxo3HPp2QS6gO74dW-orbGApVnWCFgcCP03ag_NdbAlwtVQ67DJK0JV15u65cHD9CbuewLpGdeYr2CqwGavNlEKOxcSy62yJQ8rsSMesQeQlNXIcM4Bqa1uvxxtuLsU7vgyNCHLty_a0OlmR2cdmR20BtvTzV-8iaSRAOehcM-utNfmWrNHcffY8HBkRYXu09DT9JRmiJDm-lRYazenbdrFOLND0u9R2i2j92rmFDoVqvBx4AHkrGnO2gG3OBi3qX_MgtCSt27eqTtzsrMLs6RZ3baBSynQN2PGaNrfiTjnEf5R1h3OMBV_mlQ_aQFP8RHXQ6WEX3Z7WSZV8wi3lUedXXaL13RtraipDOJpeO14HTszyRWp0fZ1jwlg0tDKHEJ-DVwjgu05EGuebh_3fc1tpnv5oY7SmDA1Gu2o0XgQkfQwCEstLpX1du74lJ4hHyxaTkEa0lGl-9bjLFN8m5ahCQyNbnW0BzAT6LpJ8bB2jPWWdoKOeAps_CBKhFDaDxt7voBcTGLcAX9XHw1EtHpW57D8SEq5IHrzte1Fs7DcBrETxbHSGvWwNUxRoFdg1xqaJEoDM2XNqYnfzwX-NbeqwxuJ6lho%3D)**

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=6f34d44c099949fba5e5ca9bb57d007d&_e=oZww9JfPwId6Cxo3HPp2QS6gO74dW-orbGApVnWCFgcCP03ag_NdbAlwtVQ67DJK0JV15u65cHD9CbuewLpGdeYr2CqwGavNlEKOxcSy62yJQ8rsSMesQeQlNXIcM4Bqa1uvxxtuLsU7vgyNCHLty_a0OlmR2cdmR20BtvTzV-8iaSRAOehcM-utNfmWrNHcffY8HBkRYXu09DT9JRmiJDm-lRYazenbdrFOLND0u9R2i2j92rmFDoVqvBx4AHkrGnO2gG3OBi3qX_MgtCSt27eqTtzsrMLs6RZ3baBSynQN2PGaNrfiTjnEf5R1h3OMBV_mlQ_aQFP8RHXQ6WEX3Z7WSZV8wi3lUedXXaL13RtraipDOJpeO14HTszyRWp0fZ1jwlg0tDKHEJ-DVwjgu-EoHAi2MqkcPuPpmwit5-1gFisdG9_b1K6M4csXP6LASKhis9YOpZoYeFamHge2iWxpTwyI82sjXWFwYyWroYznK4YKmo19Hdw4GIi5hOfzKayfJ3eKu2RHyMvWQcbTq3pJNZugcm4I1xjU5ULlti-mSJ7OJSn0H13-it4Zq9n8D8ZOUTkjMys2GxlSfdr1B9msD9Nj0kcK9AmTnLUy-iE%3D)

It’s important to keep in mind that we are still one year out from Election Day; President Biden’s poll numbers may recover – however unlikely that may be – so, **we need to remember this palpable feeling of excitement we’re all feeling right now as we head into the midterms**.

I’m looking forward to reading your survey responses!

Alek Skarlatos

clean_body: Last week, a political spectator far smarter than me laid it out in these terms --- and I’m paraphrasing: if Republicans nationwide outperformed 2020 I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, This week marks one year until the 2022 midterm elections that will decide whether we’re able to maintain our position as s center-right nation, or whether we’ll embrace the far-Left policies of the Biden Administration. It goes without saying that I’m a proponent of conservatism in the United States – and if the results of last Tuesday’s election in Virginia were any sign – I’m not alone. Last week, a political spectator far smarter than me laid it out in these terms --- and I’m paraphrasing: if Republicans nationwide outperformed 2020 numbers at the same level Virginia candidates did last week -- +12.3 pts – Republicans would pick up 51 seats in the House of representatives. It’s important to keep in mind that we are still one year out from Election Day; President Biden’s poll numbers may recover – however unlikely that may be – so, we need to remember this palpable feeling of excitement we’re all feeling right now as we head into the midterms. I’m looking forward to reading your survey responses! Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. name: Jake Strassberger, SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: A big risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Hey, I'm Jake — Sarah's campaign manager. I just took a big risk to help us flip this Senate seat from red to blue and I want to briefly explain what this means for our campaign moving forward.

**I authorized a six-figure digital ad buy to reach likely voters in every corner of Wisconsin.** This program will allow us to share our campaign message, anticipate Republican attacks, and continue to grow our organization. It was a tough decision, but I believe it will be crucial to winning this election.

To be honest with you, I approved this large investment even though it makes our budget for the quarter tighter than we would want. The way I see it is that we can’t sit on our hands until the on-year before reaching out to voters. We’ve gotta start now.

Our finance team says we’re projected to fall short on our fundraising goal before Tuesday’s mid-quarter deadline, but I’m willing to bet that this grassroots team can get us back on track and ensure we have the resources to take this calculated risk to win.

body:

clean_body: | | | | What is going on? Friend, The Border Czar is treating illegal immigrants better than Americans! Instead of Sleepy Joe Biden or Kamala Harris going to actually visit the border, which they never do, they instead want to offer amnesty and free money to illegal immigrants! While Biden is forcing Americans out of jobs if they don’t submit to his COVID-shot mandate, he’s refusing to force illegal immigrants crossing the border to get the COVID-shot! On top of that, they also want to give them $450,000 once they cross the border! This is ridiculous! While American citizens are struggling to keep a roof over their head and heat their homes, the Radical Biden Administration wants to hand out $450,000 checks to illegal immigrants. Who do they think is going to pay for it? YOU will. The same workers whose JOBS THEY ARE KILLING. Kelly will stand firm on securing and protecting our borders! Meanwhile, Liberal Lisa Murkowski has voted to allow illegal immigrants who commit crimes to come into our country and stay here. She folds to Biden at every turn! Thanks, Team Kelly | | | | ==

| | |
### Republican Rescue: Saving The Party From Truth Deniers, Conspiracy Theorists, and the Dangerous Policies of Joe Biden
---
| [Pre-Order Now!](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=c69bc2119d&e=65ae29fa7e "Pre-Order Now!")
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=b3b293bac1&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**About the Book**

Enough with the infighting, the truth-denying, the wild conspiracy claims, the looking backward, and the refusal to focus on the dangerous Biden agenda. Here’s Chris Christie’s urgent guide for recapturing Republican glory and winning elections again, told with all the New Jersey frankness and news-breaking insights that have made the two-term governor, Trump early endorser, and presidential candidate an indispensable voice and instant New York Times bestselling author.

[_Order yours today!_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=919d3c73c6&e=65ae29fa7e)
|

body:
| ****
---
Official GOP Digital Interview Form

* * *
Interviewee Locator #: 937432
Name: Willis, Peter
Subject: Woke Democrats Changing Tactics
Summary: **_Desperate not to lose their RAZOR-THIN House and Senate Majorities in the wake of the Virginia & New Jersey shakeups, Democrats are pulling out all the stops. Nancy Pelosi has "committed to bringing the fight to Republicans EACH AND EVERY DAY" -- and she's not the only one. _**

Peter, we need 2 more people from your city to give a digital interview.

Hi Peter, I wanted to touch base with you before the new week kicked off. Future Generations is growing like wild. We've just announced two more candidates for our 2022 slate, and we have more to come starting tomorrow. Before things get lost in the rush, I need to let you know about our fundraising. We're almost halfway through the month, and I'll be candid, we are running behind where we need to be. **To get things back on track, we need to raise another $5,000 before midnight tomorrow. Can we count on you to pitch in $5, $10, or $25 to catch us up?**
---
[ **Donate today** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5-3DAMMcuBelWAChxwjvOKdrn31ztUqXS7qpyqZqmvDkEg1tWkZml6RI5jlx6tBIGMoupTc4xv4cE1baBSbTqGOBorDaOATZpVHEO7dWZGkOELuL8O0_3_xTMW1d6kZgJNnEpOx_ZLC0pKGSSpf3kgdK7_nqFFJkGSRBmy76X0HYlAiKiTtkhsKEGbQRDqzp3CfPVNHdS51Y0cVn2iDlPFwdXePjSRjeFAECapEczkplwawjPfyi2Tf3ma158e-cTNJKJnqG8-g_S7wCPao7lGjxPR4-AX81VHbBkTGUI4cB33qSP6v1EeKrup6YQKw48Mse7GG9AlhGdCDhP6CR2/3h0/ZDrr2I_XT_atH_bwR-K-_A/h1/goSP72oTVYUo8lF4B9EBLr-7t5jQbQ5JBGItXBvPkJE)
---
I started Future Generations because I wanted to support grassroots, progressive candidates who are fighting for the kind of world I want to leave for my daughter -- people who won't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists, for starters. But that means these candidates depend on partner organizations like this one to bolster their campaigns and help them win. We can only do that if we have the resources. Your contributions help us pay for things like phone-banking tools, organizing software, and recruiting and training volunteers. **Donors spent a staggering $14 BILLION dollars in the 2020 elections -- over half of which was spent on Congressional races.** Most of that money came from corporate PACS and the super rich, dumping billions of dollars to elect candidates who will allow them to keep poisoning the earth and strip mining our future. But we're fighting back at Future Generations. Our youth-founded, youth-led movement is mobilizing volunteers across the country to out-organize these mega donors. **We need your support to make this work, Peter. So if you can, pitch in today to help us stay on track.** I'll be in touch again soon with our next candidate announcement, someone I'm really excited for you to meet! Until then, thank you for being part of our fight for the future. In solidarity, Roza
---

body:
What if we told you that Trump is starting to get more and more involved in this race and said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate?
#

Why today?
Why should you make a donation to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign today?
What if we told you that CNN has ranked this seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2022?
What if we told you that Trump is starting to get more and more involved in this race and said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate?”
What if we told you that a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC is already spending big to beat Mark and the only way we’ll have the resources to fight back is with your help?
Because the truth is the vast majority of donations we receive come from people like you chipping in small amounts. So while $3 may not seem like the kind of money that can win such an important race, it all adds up. And it’s why we’re asking:

subject: We MUST stop the Highest Tax Rate in the World
body:
Vote to Stop the Madness | Fight for North Jersey | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us4.campaign-archive.com/?e=ade10d3dbe&u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=3174f5d3b4)
---
| |
## Peter,

## Are we going to allow
the highest tax rates in the world?

**_Under Joe Biden's spending plan, New Jersey residents will shoulder an effective top tax rate of 63.2% - the third highest in the nation, only lower than New York and California.*_** **Join me to stop this massive tax grab.**

_I’m running for Congress to fight for North Jersey._

__**Sign the petition today**_ , let’s tell them to **STOP THE INSANITY**._ [](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=cf3b4dbea9&e=ade10d3dbe)

* Tax Foundation: [Top Tax Rate on Personal Income Would Be Highest in OECD under New Build Back Better Framework](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=1f148a0425&e=ade10d3dbe)

Larry Casha
* * *

_About Larry and his campaign: Larry is the sitting Republican State Committeeman from Morris County, has served as Council President in Kinnelon Borough and as a Trustee to the County College of Morris. He has lived his entire life in New Jersey’s 11th District. He is a small business owner deeply involved in community and charitable organizations. Larry and his wife Debra dated in high school and now are law partners. They have spent their careers fighting for the forgotten residents of New Jersey who have been abandoned by Washington and Trenton bureaucrats. It is time New Jersey gets more back on every dollar in taxes we send to Washington. It is time to save our nation from Pelosi’s socialist agenda, that is supported by Mikie Sherrill, which is attempting to change the fabric of the country. This shortchanges New Jersey, driving away the very friends and neighbors with whom we grew up._

###
---
| |
---
| **Paid for by:**

Casha For Congress, Inc.115 Horseneck RdSuite 6Montville, NJ 07045-9365
[Add us to your address book](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/vcard?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=3e51298359)

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=3e51298359&e=ade10d3dbe&c=3174f5d3b4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=3e51298359&e=ade10d3dbe&c=3174f5d3b4).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&afl=1)
---

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Re: $3.65
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

We wanted to bump this email for you in case you missed it earlier this
week. (See below!)

Here’s the short of it: we’re now less than 365 days away from Election
Day — 359 days, to be exact. And as we get closer and closer to Election
Day, it’s increasingly urgent for us to ramp up our fundraising so we can
grow our organizing work..

359 days isn’t long — not when you think about all the investments we have
to make to reach voters from the hood to the holler, ensure that voters
know who Charles Booker is, and turn out for him on Election Day. But
we’re ready to take on this challenge, and we hope you’ll join us.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12879?refcode=em20211114-1229&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1229%2E346206%2E5TaN-k ]Please take a moment to read our message below — and after you’re done,
please consider chipping in $3.65 or whatever you can afford to our
campaign to fuel our work.

With gratitude,

Team Booker

-------------------Forwarded message-------------------

The countdown begins,
Peter.

There are now exactly 365 days until Election Day. That means for the next
365 days our team needs to:

* Bring our organizing work to all 120 counties of Kentucky, from the hood to
the holler and everywhere in between.
* Train thousands of volunteers to help conduct phone banks, knock on doors,
and register Kentuckians to vote.
* Amplify our movement’s message to replace Rand Paul with a Kentuckian who
understands firsthand the challenges so many families and working people
face right now.
* And prepare for every attack Rand Paul and his friends in the GOP are going
to throw to stop our fight for bold, progressive change.

It’s going to be a lot of work. But we’re ready. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12879?refcode=em20211114-1229&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1229%2E346206%2E5TaN-k ]Will you chip in
$3.65 or anything you can to show your support for our people powered
movement? We’re racing to raise 2,022 grassroots contributions today to
send a powerful message to Rand Paul that there’s a powerful coalition
rising up to end this chapter of failed leadership in the Senate.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12879?refcode=em20211114-1229&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1229%2E346206%2E5TaN-k ]Contribute $3.65

Kentuckians have been suffering for decades at the hands of leaders like
Rand Paul. While our state has been falling behind in life expectancy,
health, and quality in education — our politicians have just been getting
richer.

That’s why over the weekend we were so excited to announce our campaign
vision for people-first change with a slate of policy priorities including
Medicare for All and universal basic income called the Kentucky New Deal.

Charles summarized our mission perfectly here: “I want more Kentuckians
having money in their pockets. I want everyone to have great, quality
health care. I want everyone to be safe in their homes and have true
community safety all across Kentucky. I want us to be healthy.”

But if we want to bring this vision to life — we have to be ready to put
in the work for the next 365 days and take on all of the special interest
donors who will be backing Rand Paul in this race.

Rand Paul and his wealthy allies will use the oldest tricks in the book:
they’ll call us names, they’ll distort facts, and they’ll lie to preserve
their grip on power. They’ll spend millions of dollars on television ads
to divide us. We can’t fall for it.

We can win — but it’s going to take all of us working together and
preparing for this competitive race starting
today. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12879?refcode=em20211114-1229&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1229%2E346206%2E5TaN-k ]Peter,
if you’re ready to get to work will you
please chip in $3.65 or anything you can to power our organizing and
campaigning work leading up to 2022?

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211114-1229-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1229_346206_5TaN-k&akid=1229%2E346206%2E5TaN-k

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1229%2E346206%2E5TaN-k

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
